videos.title: Great Drill to Stop Leading with Your Arms #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Great Drill to Stop Leading with Your Arms #golfswing #golftips If you’re struggling to compress your irons or make solid contact, this drill will change your feel instantly. Too many golfers get the classic chicken wing in their arms, leading with that and neglecting the body rotation, causing thin and inconsistent strikes. Try the push ball drill — keeping the arms straight and rotating your body through.
This teaches proper rotation, better extension, and that pure, ball-then-turf compression you see from great ball strikers.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. If you’re struggling to compress your irons or make solid contact, this drill will change your feel instantly. videos.title: Eat Pineapple on an Empty Stomach — Watch What Happens
videos.summary_source_text:
Eat Pineapple on an Empty Stomach — Watch What Happens Most people eat pineapple without realizing that the timing can completely change how it works inside the body. In this video, you’ll discover what really happens when you eat pineapple on an empty stomach and why this simple shift can make a powerful difference. Pineapple contains a unique proteolytic enzyme called bromelain that helps break down proteins, support digestion, and reduce inflammation throughout the body. When consumed away from meals, bromelain may act differently, helping the body target unwanted proteins, support healthy circulation, and enhance natural healing processes. You’ll also learn why pineapple can create that tingling sensation in your mouth, what it means, and how to reduce irritation if you’re sensitive. This video breaks down the real physiology in a simple, easy-to-understand way so you can get the most out of this everyday fruit. If you’re looking for natural ways to support digestion, reduce inflammation, and improve overall wellness, this is something you may want to start paying attention to. Always listen to your body and consult your healthcare professional if you have any underlying conditions or sensitivities.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

Tonight, they’re resting everyone but Jokic who needs to play 15 minutes to secure eligibility for the MVP and All-NBA awards. So why are they doing this? Is it just about rest? Or do they fear the Timberwolves and prefer a matchup with the Rockets? The DNVR Nuggets pregame show gives their perspective on it all.

videos.title: Is America Losing the AI Race? The Data Tells a Different Story
videos.summary_source_text:
Is America Losing the AI Race? The Data Tells a Different Story Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
The global AI race between China and the United States is intensifying, and the gap between the two superpowers is much closer than most people think. From computing power and semiconductor dominance to AI models like DeepSeek R1 and Qwen, this video breaks down the real data behind the competition.

We explore how China’s state-backed initiatives, massive data ecosystem, and rapidly growing STEM talent pipeline are challenging America’s traditional strengths in innovation, private investment, and advanced chip technology. Featuring insights and warnings from influential tech leaders such as Elon Musk and Jensen Huang, this analysis provides a clear, evidence-based perspective on the future of global AI leadership.

Whether you're a developer, investor, entrepreneur, or simply curious about the future of artificial intelligence, this video explains how this technological rivalry could reshape global markets, security, and innovation.

That’s just not true… #golf #golfing I get it - even when I was at my best, I didn’t think my game needed or “deserved” what @titleist had in stock

Perception is everything and nothing my friend

Truth is, they make irons for just about everyone these days.

No, this isn’t me telling you to run off and get your next full bag of Titleist’s.

But don’t leave them out of the running because you think you’re not “good enough”

videos.title: Oilers Are IN 🚨 McDavid, Draisaitl & Edmonton’s Best Plays of the Season
videos.summary_source_text:
Oilers Are IN 🚨 McDavid, Draisaitl & Edmonton’s Best Plays of the Season The Edmonton Oilers are heading back to the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

Led by superstars Connor McDavid and Leon Draisaitl, the Oilers have clinched a playoff berth and continue their run as one of the NHL’s top contenders.

From highlight-reel goals and dazzling assists to clutch saves and overtime moments, Edmonton has delivered all season long. With Zach Hyman also among the league’s top playoff performers in recent years, the Oilers are once again chasing their first Stanley Cup since 1990.

These are the best goals, saves, and moments that helped Edmonton punch their ticket to the playoffs.

Skillnaderna mellan hybrid och laddhybrid (PHEV).

videos.title: The #1 Workout That GREW My Shoulders Fast!
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Workout That GREW My Shoulders Fast! If you want wider shoulders fast, this is the exact shoulder workout that made the biggest difference for me.

Most people train shoulders hard, but their shoulders never actually get wider. That’s because most shoulder workouts are built around effort instead of execution.

They rely on pressing movements. They rush through reps. They use momentum instead of control.

And the result is a shoulders workout that builds fatigue, not width.

If your goal is to build bigger shoulders, broader shoulders, and that capped look that makes your upper body stand out, then your shoulder workout has to change.

This isn’t just another workout for shoulders.

This is about understanding how to actually target the lateral delts, because that is the muscle responsible for shoulder width.

In this shoulder workout, I break down the exact method that helped me grow my shoulders faster, and how you can apply it to your own training immediately.

Because here’s the problem…

Even when people try to train side delts, they still turn it into the wrong movement.

They turn lateral raises into front raises.
They let their traps take over the lift.
They swing the weight instead of controlling it.
They lose tension where it matters most.

So even though they’re doing a shoulder workout, they’re not actually training the muscle that creates width.

That’s why their shoulders don’t grow.

And that’s why most shoulders workouts fail.

In this video, you’re going to see:

The best shoulder workout approach for building width
How to properly perform lateral raises for maximum delt activation
The biggest mistakes in most shoulder workouts that limit growth
How to structure your shoulders workout for better results
The key adjustments that make your shoulder exercises actually work
How to get more out of every rep in your shoulder workout

If you’ve been searching for how to get wider shoulders, how to get bigger shoulders, or the best shoulder workout for size and width, this is where you fix it.

Because once you understand how to control the movement and keep tension on the lateral delts, everything changes.

You’ll feel it immediately in your shoulders workout.

And over time, you’ll start to see the difference in your shoulder width, your shape, and your overall physique.

Wider shoulders make your entire upper body look bigger and more athletic.

They create the illusion of a smaller waist.
They improve your proportions.
They give you that broad, powerful look.

But it only happens if your shoulder workout is built correctly.

Not just more volume.

Not just heavier weights.

Better execution.

If your current shoulder workout or shoulders workout routine isn’t giving you the results you want, then it’s time to fix how you’re training.

This is the workout for shoulders that actually delivers width.

Not hype. Not guesswork. Real results.

If you want a complete step-by-step program that builds this into your training, head to athleanx.com and find the best program for your goals.

Every ATHLEAN-X shoulder workout is designed to help you build muscle, increase strength, and improve movement at the same time.

Whether your goal is size, strength, or aesthetics, your shoulders workout has to be built with intention.

This is where you start.

videos.title: How MacKinnon and McDavid Cross Under (And Why It's Different Than What You Were Taught)
videos.summary_source_text:
How MacKinnon and McDavid Cross Under (And Why It's Different Than What You Were Taught) The Cross-under (Not Crossover): Why the under step Is Everything.

Most coaches teach the crossover by focusing on the over step. We focus on the under step  because that's where the real power and mechanical leverage come from.

In this video I break down the 4 things that actually make a cross-under work:

1) Step size: MacKinnon's bigger, more explosive rhythm vs. McDavid's smaller, higher cadence step.

2) Cadence: How to switch between styles, speeds and rhythms based on the game situation.

3)The Rocker: Landing at the heel with proper shin angle, then rockering heel to toe underneath your center of mass.

4) Staying lose: Flexible ankles (Y-angle), tilting and rotating hips, and being able to separate the upper and lower body with rotation.

This is the foundational mechanic behind the top skaters you watch crossover at speed.

00:00 — The 4 things we focus on
00:20 — Step size: McKinnon vs. McDavid styles
00:50 — Why you should master both cadences
01:15 — The rocker: heel landing, shin angle, heel-to-toe
01:50 — Why we focus on the UNDER foot, not the over foot
02:20 — Staying loose: ankles, hips, shoulders
02:40 — Y angle and ankle mobility drills
03:10 — Hip tilt and rotation
03:30 — Loose shoulders and inner spring
03:50 — Don't overthink it — you're a hockey player
04:10 — Free Downhill Skating training

videos.title: The Money in AI Isn’t Where You Think
videos.summary_source_text:
The Money in AI Isn’t Where You Think Everyone is debating GPT vs Gemini vs Llama—but that’s the wrong game. The real power in AI isn’t in the models, it’s in the infrastructure behind them.

Just like the railroad era, the money isn’t in the trains—it’s in the tracks. Today, that means data centers, chips, energy, and cloud infrastructure. The biggest companies aren’t competing on AI models—they’re investing billions into the foundation that powers everything.

If you understand this shift, you understand where the real opportunity in AI is.


#AI #ArtificialIntelligence #OpenAI #NVIDIA #TechTrends #AIBusiness #FutureOfAI #Entrepreneurship

videos.title: Feed What You Need in Your Swing #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Feed What You Need in Your Swing #golfswing #golftips Shot shape is heavily influenced by how you turn in the backswing compared to how you turn through the ball. A greater turn back can encourage a draw, while more turn through often promotes a fade. Experimenting with this relationship helps you identify what your swing needs to keep the ball in play more consistently.
If shot shape or consistency off the tee is something you’re working on, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear structure to understand your tendencies and manage them with confidence.
Subscribe to Me and My Golf for more simple golf tips. Shot shape is heavily influenced by how you turn in the backswing compared to how you turn through the ball. videos.title: The #1 Best Way to Lose Hip & Butt Cellulite
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Best Way to Lose Hip & Butt Cellulite Struggling with hip and butt cellulite that won’t go away? Discover how to get rid of cellulite fast with the right lower body workout that builds glute muscles and supports smoother, firmer skin.

0:00 Introduction: How to get rid of cellulite
0:17 Why cellulite won’t go away
2:00 Eliminating butt cellulite
4:51 Cellulite and diet
5:30 Lower body workout for cellulite removal

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4dG9vRE

Keep watching for more fat-burning and muscle-building tips:
▶️ https://youtu.be/XPDzypsisI4
▶️ https://youtu.be/leIg3awLeak
▶️ https://youtu.be/FAuClbdfqrI

Cellulite on your thighs and butt isn’t always just fat. It’s often caused by atrophy of your fascia. The best way to get rid of cellulite is to build muscle.

The glutes are the largest muscles in the entire body, and they’re often weakened by a sedentary lifestyle. To eliminate hip and butt cellulite, a full lower body workout is essential rather than focusing solely on glute exercises. Focus on building glute muscle instead of weight loss to eliminate cellulite.

If your diet is high in carbohydrates, it will be difficult to get rid of cellulite, even with the right exercises. Carbohydrates keep insulin and inflammation high, making cellulite removal nearly impossible.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 60, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

Dr. Berg is a licensed chiropractor in Virginia, California, and Louisiana, but he no longer practices chiropractic in any state and does not see patients, so he can focus on educating people as a full-time activity, yet he maintains an active license. videos.title: Live From Penticton ft. Dan Near & Graham Fraser | The Sheet with Jeff Marek
videos.summary_source_text:
Live From Penticton ft. Dan Near & Graham Fraser | The Sheet with Jeff Marek Jeff Marek is LIVE from Penticton for a special Saturday edition of The Sheet as he’s joined by Graham Fraser, owner of the Penticton Vees, and Dan Near, Commissioner of the WHL. With the WHL playoffs in full swing, the conversation turns to the biggest storylines around the league, the intensity of the postseason, and what to watch for as teams chase a spot in the Memorial Cup. The guys also dive into Kelowna hosting the Memorial Cup, what that means for the region and the league, and the growing excitement around junior hockey in British Columbia. Plus, they discuss Penticton’s transition into the WHL, what the Vees’ first season in the league will look like, the long-term vision for the franchise, and how the move reshapes the WHL landscape. All that and more from Penticton on this special Saturday edition of The Sheet.

videos.summary_source_text:
What Happens If You Consumed Omega-3 Fish Oils for 30 Days Get access to my FREE resources 👉 https://drbrg.co/3Ow3ixf

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

70% of the population is deficient in omega-3 fatty acids. Find out why and what would happen if you started consuming more omega-3 fatty acids. 

Check out Dr. Berg's Cod Liver Oil Supplement Here: 🛒 https://drbrg.co/41ixdMj
 
Test Link Here: https://omegaquant.com/what-is-the-omega-3-index/ 

DATA:
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3206354/ 
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3076650/ 

0:00 Introduction: Omega-3 fatty acids explained 
0:28 Best sources of omega-3 fatty acids 
1:20 Benefits of omega-3 fatty acids 
3:10 What could happen if you consumed more omega-3 fatty acids 
4:47 Side effects of fish oil 
5:45 What causes a deficiency of omega-3 fatty acids? 
6:45 What to do if you can’t absorb fats  
7:35 Learn more about the benefits of grass-fed beef! 

Let’s talk about the benefits of omega-3 fatty acids and what would happen if you started consuming them more often. 

Omega-3 fatty acids are essential for the body, but our bodies can’t produce them. 

You can get omega-3 fatty acids by consuming a high-quality cod liver oil or fish oil supplement. I prefer cod liver oil because it has additional vitamin A and vitamin D. 

However, it’s best to get your omega-3 fatty acids from food. Foods rich in omega-3 fatty acids include: 
 • Fatty fish 
 • Sardines 
 • Grass-fed beef
 • Organ meats 
 • Eggs 

EPA and DHA are important omega-3s. EPA mainly helps reduce inflammation. DHA primarily helps support the brain. Omega-3 fatty acids may even help people with asthma and allergies. 

Consuming more omega-3 fatty acids may potentially help with certain symptoms, including:
 • Dry eyes 
 • Dermatitis 
 • Macular degeneration 
 • Arthritis 
 • Arrhythmias 
 • High blood pressure 
 • Leg cramps 
 • Insomnia  
 • Menstrual cramps 

More potential benefits of consuming omega-3 fatty acids: 
 • Improvements in fatty liver disease 
 • Increased calcium absorption  
 • Decreased risk of certain types of cancer 

One small issue some people experience after taking fish oil is burping. You can take fish oil in capsule form, which shouldn’t cause burping. If you’re vegan or are allergic to fish, a good alternative is consuming algae. 

It’s important to note that omega-6 fatty acids compete with omega-3 fatty acids. One of the biggest causes of a deficiency of omega-3 fatty acids is excess consumption of omega-6 fatty acids. 

If you have trouble absorbing fats easily, you may want to try taking purified bile salts to increase the absorption of omega-3 fatty acids and fat-soluble vitamins.

videos.title: Nikola Jokic and the Denver Nuggets make fans confident after an 11-game win streak | Serbian Corner
videos.summary_source_text:
Nikola Jokic and the Denver Nuggets make fans confident after an 11-game win streak | Serbian Corner In the week behind us, Nikola Jokic, Jamal Murray, Aaron Gordon, and the Denver Nuggets expanded their win streak with the wins versus the Trailblazers, Grizzlies, and the OKC Thunder. The 11-win streak is the new Jokic-era Nuggets record.
DNVR's Brendan Vogt joins Miroslav to discuss last night's game versus the 1-seed OKC and other topics, including:

• Can Big Val and Julian Strawther use the OKC game as a launch pad before the playoffs?
• Reasons behind the 11-game win streak
• Joker and Jamal combine for tandem's best season so far. Does that hide some downside, too?
• First thing we'll remember about this regular season
• Difference in vibes versus last season
• Hopes for the 82nd games slate
• Who is more fun to watch: Ant or Durant?

videos.summary_source_text:
OpenClaw 4.11 Just Changed AI Agents Forever Want to make money and save time with AI? Get AI Coaching, Support & Courses 👉 https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

OpenCL 4.11: Import ChatGPT History into Dreaming Memory + Major Stability & Messaging Fixes

OpenCL 4.11 ships with 355,000 GitHub stars, 3.2M active users, and 1,600+ contributors, focusing on making agents more stable and harder to break. The headline feature is importing your full ChatGPT conversation history into OpenCL’s Dreaming memory, generating long-term insights via new UI tabs (Imported Insights and Memory Palace) and storing learnings in Memory.md with transparent Dreams UI. Stability improvements include safer provider routing, hardened transport, and fixed provider fallbacks so errors don’t carry over between model attempts. Multi-agent reliability is improved by suppressing subagent “chatter,” and exec approvals now respect timeouts for slower models. Additional fixes cover local model picker caching (Ollama), WhatsApp (accounts, reactions, image edit paths), Telegram thread file splitting, Teams reactions and setup, control UI audio/history improvements, parity testing between GPT 5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6, Codex OAuth login, audio transcription, macOS talk-mode mic permissions, and self-describing plugin manifests as the ecosystem grows past 44,000 skills.

videos.title: Oettinger’s 22 Saves Leads Stars To 2-0 Shutout Of NY Rangers, Clinch Home Ice | DLLS STARS POSTGAME
videos.summary_source_text:
Oettinger’s 22 Saves Leads Stars To 2-0 Shutout Of NY Rangers, Clinch Home Ice | DLLS STARS POSTGAME Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

Jason Robertson scored twice and Jake Oettinger stopped all 22 shots he faced as the Dallas Stars blanked the New York Rangers 2-0 on Saturday afternoon at American Airlines Center. Robertson scored both his 43rd and 44th goals of the season in the third period, both on rebounds from Matt Duchene shots. The game-winner came on the power play at 12:49 and the second was an empty-net goal after Duchene hit the right post. Oettinger records his 4th shutout of the season, his second most shutouts in a single season (5, 2022-23), and the 16th of his NHL career. While the Stars officially clinched home ice advantage for the first round of the playoffs in the middle of the third period, when Minnesota lost to Nashville, the victory in the regular season home finale allowed Dallas to punctuate a fantastic regular season, with two road games left on the calendar. Join the DLLS Stars Post Game Show as we recap all the main storylines, provide comprehensive breakdowns of key plays, Sam reports live from the AAC and we take your Super Chats!

Jason Robertson scored twice and Jake Oettinger stopped all 22 shots he faced as the Dallas Stars blanked the New York Rangers 2-0 on Saturday afternoon at American Airlines Center. Robertson scored both his 43rd and 44th goals of the season in the third period, both on rebounds from Matt Duchene shots. The game-winner came on the power play at 12:49 and the second was an empty-net goal after Duchene hit the right post. Oettinger records his 4th shutout of the season, his second most shutouts in a single season (5, 2022-23), and the 16th of his NHL career. While the Stars officially clinched home ice advantage for the first round of the playoffs in the middle of the third period, when Minnesota lost to Nashville, the victory in the regular season home finale allowed Dallas to punctuate a fantastic regular season, with two road games left on the calendar. Join the DLLS Stars Post Game Show as we recap all the main storylines, provide comprehensive breakdowns of key plays, Sam reports live from the AAC and we take your Super Chats!

videos.title: McDavid Guide to Enter the Offensive Zone
videos.summary_source_text:
McDavid Guide to Enter the Offensive Zone In this breakdown , we’re diving into Connor McDavid’s drive wide guide. Whether you’re a fan of hockey superstar Connor McDavid or simply aiming to up your game, we’ve got an exciting formula to share with you.

You might be wondering, what’s the secret behind McDavid’s net driving success? Hint: it’s not all about his speed. There’s a strategic approach that sets him apart. And the best part? You don’t need to be the fastest skater out there to master this technique. 

Let’s break it down step by step. McDavid’s winning formula begins when he gains possession of the puck between the dots, positioning himself strategically within this zone. Step two involves a crossover or step towards the boards. This creates space between him and the defenseman, a key advantage that you’ll witness in action.

But here comes the game-changer: step three. McDavid initiates crossing over towards the defenseman. This isn’t just about speed; it’s about efficiency and deception. Crossing over proves to be not only faster than regular forward skating but also incredibly deceptive, giving him the edge he needs.

Contrast this with the typical approaches other players take. They might rush straight down from the boards or head directly into the corner, missing out on the strategy that makes McDavid’s drives so effective. His pattern starts between the dots, widens out, and he smartly crosses over towards the defenseman, giving him the upper hand every time.

Thanks for tuning in to this enlightening breakdown! If you’re hungry for more insights into hockey mechanics and skills, don’t miss out on our free training sessions. Do This Before Breakfast — Your Blood Pressure Will Drop If your blood pressure has been creeping up, this simple morning habit may help support healthier circulation naturally. In this video, I show you how a powerful combination of garlic, lemon, and warm water works together to relax blood vessels, improve blood flow, and reduce strain on the heart. You’ll learn the real physiology behind how crushed garlic activates allicin to help dilate arteries, how vitamin C and flavonoids from lemon support vascular elasticity, and why timing this before breakfast can enhance absorption and effectiveness. This easy-to-make shot takes just minutes, yet it may help your body feel the difference quickly when used consistently. Try it for yourself and see how your body responds. videos.summary_source_text:
Why shoulder position matters in chipping #golfswing #golftips Chipping becomes much more reliable when the shoulders are positioned correctly throughout the motion. Using a reverse-hand grip — popularised by players like Matt Fitzpatrick — helps the body work together and keeps the stroke more connected. When the setup supports the motion, strike and distance control improve naturally.

1/2 cup (100 g) canned corn.
Olive oil.
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
Olive oil.
Sesame seeds.
Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for about 90 minutes.

videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-6 “Spud” Explained: The 2M Token Context Window ChatGPT Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
GPT-6 is coming—and it might be OpenAI’s most powerful AI model yet. In this video, we break down everything we actually know about GPT-6, codenamed “Spud.” From confirmed information to credible leaks and industry speculation, this analysis separates fact from fiction.

We explore insights from OpenAI executives, the reported completion of pretraining, expected capabilities like persistent memory, multimodal understanding, and massive context windows. We also compare GPT-6 with competitors such as Gemini 3.1 Ultra and Claude Mythos, and discuss its potential impact on industries like healthcare, software engineering, and business operations.

Whether you're a developer, entrepreneur, or AI enthusiast, this video provides a clear and unbiased look at what the future of AI might hold.

videos.title: Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Morning Skate at Toronto Maple Leafs. ‘Been Rough for Both of Us’
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Morning Skate at Toronto Maple Leafs. ‘Been Rough for Both of Us’ Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media before his team plays the host Toronto Maple Leafs on Saturday, April 11, 2026. 

The Panthers lost both Seth Jones and Dmitry Kulikov to broken bones in Tuesday’s 4-3 shootout loss in Montreal. Jones has a fracture in his foot; Kulikov broke a finger. 

Florida has lost four straight (0-3-1) and had two rookie defensemen making their NHL debut in Marek Alscher and Ludvig Jansson on Thursday. Wilmer Skoog could make his debut tonight. 

This is Florida’s final road game of the season. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.summary_source_text:
Is the Amazon Golf Ball any good? 👀 Plenty of you were curious (and so were we)

For now?
The first dozen looks pretty damn clean.

Coming from the same factory (and featuring same stamping) as the PXG, Malbon ball and the Kirkland Signature - we had high hopes

Yes, they’re sold out, for now.

But for nearly a dollar a ball - these aren’t even CLOSE to your worst option. (So keep an eye out for restock)

But this doesn’t tell the FULL story.

videos.title: Att man ska ha torrt krut redo att investera är en myt utan stöd i forskningen ❌
videos.summary_source_text:
Att man ska ha torrt krut redo att investera är en myt utan stöd i forskningen ❌ ⚠️ Viktig info:

Detta innehåll är inte individuell investeringsrådgivning. Ett sparande i linje med forskningens rekommendationer har historiskt sett varit framgångsrikt. Det finns mycket som talar för att så även kommer vara framgent, men det finns inga garantier. Historisk avkastning är ingen garanti för framtida avkastning. Alla investeringar innebär risk och kan både öka och minska i värde. Investera inte pengar du inte har råd att förlora. Mer info på rikatillsammans.se.

Författat av Jan Bolmeson per publicerat datum. Vi är fristående från nämnda bolag och värdepapper; ingen ersättning har utgått om ej annat anges ovan. Vi avser inte följa upp detta innehåll. ⚠️ Viktig info:

videos.title: Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. By allowing the lead shoulder to cover the lead leg and moving cohesively—shifting and turning together—you arrive at the impact line sooner and with more control. Using an alignment stick against the lead hip gives a clear visual of where impact should be and how early you can get there. This creates a smoother transition and much more consistent contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. videos.title: How to Strike Your Pitch Shots From 30 - 80 Yards Every Time!
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Strike Your Pitch Shots From 30 - 80 Yards Every Time! Struggling with pitch shots from 30 to 80 yards? That awkward distance that's too far for a chip shot but too short for a full swing is where most golfers drop unnecessary shots every single round — and it's almost always fixable with three simple changes to your golf swing pattern.

Most golf tips for pitching focus on mechanics that make the motion feel more complicated than it needs to be. But when you watch the best players pitch the golf ball, there's nothing complicated happening. Their bodies are stacked, their rhythm is effortless and the club face works with gravity rather than against it. In this golf pitching lesson I want to show you exactly how to recreate that feeling — the same three things I share with every student who comes to me struggling with their short game.

The third technique in this lesson is something a good friend and fellow coach Joe Mayo showed me — and I'll be honest, it completely changed how I think about pitching, chipping and even how to hit irons consistently. If you've been gripping your wedge and trying to lift the ball into the air, this one is going to feel like a revelation.

⬇️ FREE PRACTICE GUIDE — Everything from this golf pitching lesson in one free download you can access here: https://www.dannymaude.com/how-to-strike-pitch-shots-every-time

What you'll learn in this golf pitching lesson:

▶ Why pitch shots from 30 to 80 yards feel so awkward — and the simple golf swing fix
▶ How to stack your body correctly for effortless, consistent pitch shots every time
▶ The tick tock rhythm drill that transforms your pitching and short game immediately
▶ The prop drill for pitch shots — same principle that works for chip shots and irons
▶ The game changing club face technique Joe Mayo showed me that most golfers never know
▶ How these golf tips apply to chipping, irons and your full golf swing too
▶ Why the best players take loft off the club rather than trying to lift it

---

⏱️ CHAPTERS

0:00 — Why pitch shots from 30 to 80 yards feel so difficult
1:02 — What consistent pitching actually looks like
2:09 — Step 1: Stacking your body for consistent pitch shot contact
3:31 — How the prop drill applies to pitch shots and chip shots
4:35 — Step 2: The tick tock rhythm that creates effortless pitching
6:18 — How rhythm controls your pitch shot distance and depth
8:13 — Step 3: The club face secret Joe Mayo showed me
9:39 — Why the best players take loft off not lift it
10:55 — Putting all three together for effortless pitch shots

These golf pitching tips work for all levels — whether you're a beginner trying to understand how to pitch a golf ball for the first time, a mid-handicapper who dreads the awkward 40 to 60 yard shot, or an experienced golfer whose short game lets down an otherwise solid round. If your chip shots feel reasonable but pitch shots still feel jerky and inconsistent, these three golf swing patterns will change that. The same principles that create a consistent golf swing apply directly to your pitching — and once you feel all three working together, that awkward yardage becomes one of the most satisfying shots in the game.

If this helped your pitching and short game, hit the like button and subscribe — I release a new golf lesson every single week to help you save shots and play more consistent golf.

📩 Want personalised help with your short game? Head to https://www.dannymaude.com for lessons and coaching.

---

videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Exercise to Lift a Sagging Face & Turkey Neck What causes face drooping? Discover how stress affects the face, leading to loose skin under the chin, sagging skin, and face drooping. I’ll share an easy droopy face solution to reverse a sagging face so you can start aging more gracefully. 

0:00 Introduction: What causes a sagging face?
1:06 Aging skin on the face
2:23 The platysma muscle 
3:10 Cortisol and your facial muscles 
4:02 How to tighten skin naturally 
5:06 Facial exercises for sagging skin 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/41mRkcj

▶️ https://youtu.be/MTpnF4V8stA
▶️ https://youtu.be/GFE8qfwN23U
▶️ https://youtu.be/4x3Tk0JiiGc

Aging often shows up in your face first because the face is a sensory organ. Receptors for hormones are highly concentrated in your face because your face shows your emotions. Cortisol can wreak havoc on your skin and facial muscles. 

The platysma muscle has the most significant effect on your face. The facial toning exercises in this video strengthen the platysma, other facial muscles, tendons, ligaments, and fascia around the lower part of the face.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.title: The BEST irons that you NEED 👀
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST irons that you NEED 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Winner Takes All: Jokic vs SGA for MVP | GS MoodSwings
videos.summary_source_text:
Winner Takes All: Jokic vs SGA for MVP | GS MoodSwings Welcome back to MoodSwings presented by Landmark Lincoln…your new favorite sports therapy show.

The Denver Nuggets are heating up at exactly the right time, riding a 10-game win streak into the final stretch of the regular season—but the bigger conversation might be happening around Nikola Jokic’s legacy.

On this episode of Mood Swings, Liv breaks down why Jokic is no longer just an MVP candidate, but an undeniable all-time great. From revisiting her 2023 take that Jokic is a top 5 center ever, to challenging the NBA’s obsession with “ring culture,” this episode dives into what actually defines greatness in today’s game.

Plus, the MVP race is coming down to the wire. With Jokic and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander going head-to-head, Liv makes the case for a “winner takes all” showdown between Denver and OKC. Is Jokic leading the hottest team in the league enough? Or does SGA’s dominance on a top-seeded Thunder squad give him the edge?

With the playoffs right around the corner, the Nuggets are finally looking like the team everyone expected at the start of the season. The question is—can they carry this momentum into a deep postseason run?

videos.title: The #1 Collagen Tip for Amazing Hair, Nails, & Skin
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Collagen Tip for Amazing Hair, Nails, & Skin Get access to my FREE resources 👉
https://drbrg.co/4sl4qBy

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Check out this useful tip that can give you better hair, nails, skin, and more!

DATA:
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/20093739/ 
https://openheart.bmj.com/content/1/1/e000103

0:00 Introduction: What is collagen? 
0:26 What is glycine? 
1:10 Glycine and glutathione
1:30 Benefits of glycine
4:26 Glycine deficiency
5:00 Best sources of glycine 
6:35 Can you take too much glycine? 
6:50 How to take glycine
6:55 Why you need glycine

In this video, we’ll discuss a very important amino acid: glycine. Collagen is a main component of connective tissues, tendons, ligaments, and cartilage. About ⅓ of collagen is made by glycine.

Your body can make glycine, but unfortunately, it doesn’t make very much. If you're not getting it from the diet, you could be deficient. Unless you’re eating the skin and cartilage from meat, you’re probably not getting enough glycine.

Glycine is needed to make the most important antioxidant for all of your cells, glutathione. Without enough glycine to make glutathione, you can’t detoxify your body. This can cause a buildup of toxicity, leading to inflammation. 

Glycine is a potent anti-inflammatory agent and is an essential building block for many enzymes and proteins. 

Here are some of the many important functions of glycine:
• Makes heme in your blood
• Important for gum health
• Essential for DNA 
• Building block for catalase 
• Supports sleep
• Supports the liver
• Can help fix a leaky gut
• Detoxifies uric acid
• Supports blood sugar
• Helps with weight loss
• Reduces visceral fat 

Glycine can also turn into glucose to be used as fuel. Certain parts of the body, especially the brain, need a certain amount of glucose. If you’re not consuming glucose, your body can make it. Glycine is a precursor for glucose, but don’t worry about it bumping you out of ketosis. Glycine stimulates the hormone glucagon, which opposes insulin.  

If you’re not eating animals nose-to-tail, if you’re under stress, taking medication, drinking alcohol, or exposed to toxins, you can become deficient in glycine. 

You can increase your glycine intake by consuming gelatin! Try making your own gelatin using Knox Blox and using a natural sweetener like stevia. You can also take a glycine supplement. The average person needs about 4 to 10 grams of glycine per day. 

Bone broth and pork rinds can increase your glycine intake, but you need to consume a lot to get enough glycine.

As we age, we need more glycine. Increasing glycine intake can potentially help people with osteoarthritis, osteoporosis, hair thinning, insomnia, gout, and kidney stones.

Recept:
Karaage Japansk friterad kyckling 

Karaage är min stora kärlek på tallriken – krispigt, saftigt och oemotståndligt gott! Varje tugga är en perfekt balans mellan det frasiga höljet och den möra kycklingen, med en smak som får mig att le varje gång. Doppa i japansk majonnäs, pressa över lite citron, och jag är i himmelriket, tillbaka i en charmig pub bland tokyos gator och neonljusen. Det är comfort food på högsta nivå – och jag kan aldrig få nog!

30 min
4p
Ingredienser:
800 g kycklinglårfilé eller kycklingsteak 
3 msk ljus sojasås
2 msk mirin
2 tsk riven vitlök
2 tsk riven ingefära 
1 msk sesamolja
Salt 
1 dl maizena
1 dl vetemjöl
1-2L Neutral olja till fritering, rapsolja
Tillbehör:
Japansk majonnäs (t.ex. Kewpie)
Citronklyftor
Finskuren salladslök
Serveras med:
En skål nykokt japanskt ris
En enkel strimlad vitkålsallad

Gör så här:
Skär kycklingen i ca 4x4 cm stora bitar.
Blanda sojasås, mirin, vitlök, ingefära, sesamolja, salt i en skål. Lägg i kycklingen och marinera i minst 15 minuter.
Hetta upp oljan till 170°C i en kastrull eller fritös.
Blanda Mjöl och maizena i en bunke, Ta upp kycklingen ur marinaden och vänd den i mjölblandningen så att den täcks jämnt.
Fritera kycklingen i omgångar i 3-4 minuter tills den är gyllene. Lyft upp och låt rinna av på hushållspapper.
Fritera kycklingen en andra gång i 1-2 minuter för extra krispighet.
Servera med japansk majonnäs, citronklyftor och strö över finhackad salladslök.
Tips: Dubbel fritering gör kycklingen extra krispig!

videos.title: Are supercars POINTLESS? Corvette Z06 v Rivian R1T: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Are supercars POINTLESS? Corvette Z06 v Rivian R1T: DRAG RACE Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1104

Mat’s flown over to the USA for an American car showdown! 

He’s got his hands on an all-new Rivian R1T Quad Motor, and he’s going up against a Corvette Z06! 

It’s a petrol vs electric head-to-head, but does this colossal all-electric pick-up truck have what it takes to bring down one of the most iconic American sports cars? Let’s take a look at the stats… 

Starting with the Rivian, it’s equipped with four electric motors (one for each wheel), and these combine to produce 1,025hp and 1,624Nm of torque! It comes with launch control, but it also comes with a hefty weight, tipping the scales at 3,170kg! New, it costs from $119,000. 

Then we come to the Corvette. It’s powered by a 5.5-litre naturally-aspirated V8, and this creates 670hp and 625Nm. All this power is sent to the rear wheels via an 8-speed dual-clutch gearbox, and it weighs in at almost half the weight of the Rivian - 1,685kg! A new one of these will have a price tag of around $120,000. 

So they both cost around the same, but that’s about where the similarities between these end! So, which do you think will snatch the win? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE! 

Thanks to everyone who helped set up this race: 
- Jesse Iwuji: https://www.instagram.com/jesse_iwuji/
- Santa Margarita Ranch: https://www.instagram.com/santa.margarita.ranch/
- Rugged Radios: https://www.instagram.com/ruggedradios/ Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1104

videos.title: Han varnade för Hitler
videos.summary_source_text:
Han varnade för Hitler 00:00 Start
00:40 Opinion mot Nazityskland
03:20 Segerstedt och Norge
04:08 Invasionen 1940
07:27 Segerstedt ett problem för regeringen
08:40 Tyska järnvägstransporter genom Sverige
10:08 Statlig censur
11:14 Freden 1945

Krig i Norden:
Under andra världskriget befann sig Norge och Sverige i helt olika situationer. I april 1940 invaderades Norge av Nazityskland, medan Sverige lyckades hålla sig utanför kriget. Den svenska regeringen tvingades till eftergifter för att inte också Sverige skulle utsättas för en tysk invasion. En av de skarpaste kritikerna av Nazityskland och den svenska regeringens undfallenhet var Torgny Segerstedt, redaktör för Göteborgs Handels- och Sjöfarts-Tidning (GHT).

Flera gånger under kriget togs tidningen i beslag för att undvika att provocerande artiklar publicerades. Klagomål på GHT kom till och med från riksminister Hermann Göring. GHT smugglades in i Norge och blev en inspirationskälla för den norska kampen mot ockupationsmakten. Själv inspirerades Torgny Segerstedt av Norges kung Haakon VII, som ledde den norska exilregeringen från England.

Filmen är en del av serien "Tusen år av norsk historia i Göteborgsområdet", som lyfter fram de historiska banden mellan Norge och västra Sverige. Filmprojektet är en officiell del av Nasjonaljubileet 2030 - Norge i tusen år, ett jubileum som synliggör Norges historia, kultur och gemensamma nordiska arv.

Detta avsnitt berättar om en utmanande tid, då världskrig och storpolitik fick återverkningar i Norden. En skarp röst från Göteborg blev både hatad och beundrad.

Julian Strawther and David Roddy lead the Nuggets to their 11th straight win | DNVR Nuggets Postgame The Denver Nuggets won the rest-your-starters bowl over the Oklahoma City Thunder. They keep the 3-seed in their control. Julian Strawther had another brilliant game and continues his hot shooting streak. Zeke Nnaji had some big moments, and surprise of the game David Roddy completely took over the game in the 4th quarter. Is there anything to take away from this game? Dallas Mavericks rookie star Cooper Flagg scored 33 points, but Victor Wembanyama’s 40 points were more than enough to lead the San Antonio Spurs to the win. The Mavs are now officially done on the road this season. The DLLS Mavs crew breaks down the game, vibes out to extreme, unprecedented levels, cheers on the Memphis Grizzlies, and does a Tankathon spin, all live on YouTube.

videos.title: The Most Overlooked Turn In Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
The Most Overlooked Turn In Hockey The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Claude Mythos Explained
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Mythos Explained This is the biggest AI story this week BY FAR.

Anthropic just revealed "Claude Mythos", a model so powerful and so good at hacking that they’ve decided it’s too dangerous to release to the public.

Because of the unprecedented potential of this model, Anthropic is keeping it under lock and key, only granting access to a few elite security teams via "Project Glasswing."

Is this the end of software security as we know it, or the beginning of a new AI-driven defense era? 

To stay up-to-date with all the AI news, check out my weekly AI news videos on my channel!

videos.title: Grok 5: The 6 Trillion Parameter AI That Could Change Everything
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5: The 6 Trillion Parameter AI That Could Change Everything 👉 Try BlueStacks AI: https://bluestacks.ai/

Elon Musk has publicly suggested that xAI’s Grok 5 could have a real chance of reaching Artificial General Intelligence (AGI)—a bold claim that has sparked intense debate across the AI industry. In this video, we break down everything you need to know about Grok 5, including its rumored six trillion parameters, Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture, massive context window, and the Colossus 2 supercomputer powering its training.

We also explore how Grok 5 compares with leading AI models like GPT, Gemini, and Claude, analyze its expected timeline, and discuss the significant safety concerns following earlier Grok incidents. Whether you're a developer, business leader, or AI enthusiast, this video provides a clear and balanced perspective on one of the most ambitious AI projects ever attempted.

videos.title: Marco D'Amico on why Cole Caufield’s 50-Goal Season Is Just the Beginning | The Sheet
videos.summary_source_text:
Marco D'Amico on why Cole Caufield’s 50-Goal Season Is Just the Beginning | The Sheet Marco D'Amico of RG Media to break down Cole Caufield scoring his 50th goal of the season, becoming the first player for the Montreal Canadiens to reach the milestone since Stéphane Richer in 1989–90. The two discuss the electric atmosphere at the Bell Centre, Caufield’s development under head coach Martin St. Louis, and why his offensive breakout could be sustainable moving forward.

The conversation also dives into the continued growth of Canadiens captain Nick Suzuki, the impact of young stars like Juraj Slafkovský and Lane Hutson, and what this new core means for the future of hockey in Montreal. Marek and D’Amico also discuss the unique pressure and history that comes with playing in one of hockey’s most iconic markets.

#TheSheet #JeffMarek #MarcoDAmico #MontrealCanadiens #GoHabsGo #ColeCaufield #NickSuzuki #JurajSlafkovsky #LaneHutson #NHL #StanleyCupPlayoffs #TampaBayLightning #Hockey #DailyFaceoff

Reach out to sales@thenationnetwork.com to connect with our Sales Team and discuss opportunities to partner with us!

videos.title: Caufield Scores 50 as Metro Race Tightens & Heiskanen's Injury Concerns | DFO Rundown
videos.summary_source_text:
Caufield Scores 50 as Metro Race Tightens & Heiskanen's Injury Concerns | DFO Rundown The playoff race is tightening — and major storylines are unfolding across the league.

On this episode of the DFO Rundown, we break down Cole Caufield scoring his 50th goal of the season, making history in Montreal and delivering a massive win for the Canadiens as they continue to push toward the postseason.

We also dive into the Metro Division race, where every point is becoming critical, and take a closer look at the Pittsburgh Penguins’ playoff path as they may have a path to the Eastern Conference Final.

Plus, we discuss the potential impact of Miro Heiskanen’s injury, what it could mean for Dallas, and preview a key Minnesota vs Dallas matchup with major playoff implications.

We also cover:
• The Utah Mammoth clinching a playoff berth
• The evolving Western Conference playoff race
• A breakdown of the Jack Adams race
• A debate on Evan Bouchard vs Zach Werenski
• A preview of Carolina vs Ottawa

videos.title: Quiet Woodworking In The Swedish Wilderness
videos.summary_source_text:
Quiet Woodworking In The Swedish Wilderness New batch of my own cutting boards is finally available:
https://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

All of the beams for the outdoor kitchen are completed in this video. In the next one, I’ll burn them and raise the full structure! Something I’ve really been looking forward to. I also cook a traditional Swedish dish called “raggmunk”, a potato pancake with extra crisp only achievable with the high heat possible in a carbon steel pan.

I’m using my pans from Kockums Jernverk, made in Sweden from high-quality Swedish steel. They create a natural non-stick surface and work just as well over an open fire as they do in your kitchen. Built to last a lifetime, they’re one of the most affordable choices you can make in the long run.
It’s craftsmanship I truly believe in, made with the same values I stand for. I’m proud to represent them.

Get the same pan here:
👉 https://www.kockumsjernverk.se/sv/kolstalsstekpannor/stekpanna-o28-cm

P.S. I might have added the leather belt seen in the video to my website 😉

Thank you all for watching my videos, it means the world and thank you Stevie Antoniou for helping me edit my videos!

🌳🪵 A massive thank you to Revolution Race for the clothes that you know I am always wearing.
Get the same clothes here: https://bit.ly/4nkgMZw

____

My own website: http://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

I hand-craft my own cutting boards in the log cabin. I can only make a few at a time, so you have to be first to buy one when a new batch is released. They are made from hard nordic oak, making them extremely durable, holding up for a lifetime of abuse. Instead of having a plastic cutting board that really should be thrown away after 2 years.

I was told that my dream of selling handmade products wouldn’t work in today's world where everything is mass produced. I want to prove them wrong. My goal is to expand into other handmade products. Making a series of lifetime quality handmade goods. Breaking free from mass production, supporting our environment.

____

https://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

It’s craftsmanship I truly believe in, made with the same values I stand for. I’m proud to represent them.

Get the same pan here:
👉 https://www.kockumsjernverk.se/sv/kolstalsstekpannor/stekpanna-o28-cm

P.S. I might have added the leather belt seen in the video to my website 😉

Thank you all for watching my videos, it means the world and thank you Stevie Antoniou for helping me edit my videos!

🌳🪵 A massive thank you to Revolution Race for the clothes that you know I am always wearing.
Get the same clothes here: https://bit.ly/4nkgMZw

____

My own website: http://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

I hand-craft my own cutting boards in the log cabin. I can only make a few at a time, so you have to be first to buy one when a new batch is released. They are made from hard nordic oak, making them extremely durable, holding up for a lifetime of abuse. Instead of having a plastic cutting board that really should be thrown away after 2 years.

videos.title: Episode 40: DeBoer Debuts, And Analytics | Tri-State Hockey Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Episode 40: DeBoer Debuts, And Analytics | Tri-State Hockey Podcast Episode 40 of the Tri-State Hockey Podcast, presented by bet365, features Jonny Lazarus, Arthur Staple, and Mike Rupp breaking down a huge week for all three local teams. The guys start with the New York Islanders and the early impact of Pete DeBoer behind the bench, including what changed in the win over Toronto, the importance of Tony DeAngelo, Kyle Ritchie’s growing role, Matthew Schaefer’s rise, and what the playoff push means for the organization. Then the conversation shifts to the New York Rangers as the crew digs into the criticism surrounding J.T. Miller, what captaincy in New York really means, lineup construction questions, and how injuries may have shaped the season more than people realize. They wrap with a deep dive into the New Jersey Devils’ GM search, analytics in front offices, roster-building philosophy, and what the next decision means for Sheldon Keefe and the future in Jersey. Presented by bet365 — whatever the moment, it’s never ordinary.

Timestamps:

00:00 Intro

17:06 Fan expectations and the pressure around a coaching change
20:42 Barzal’s comments on neutral-zone possession and second-wave offense

1:08:26 End

videos.title: The BEST Natural Teeth Whitening Formula (Works FAST!)
videos.summary_source_text:

This simple 3-ingredient formula can help remove stains, brighten your smile, and freshen your breath naturally. It takes just 2 minutes using ingredients you may already have at home. If you want whiter teeth without damaging your enamel, this formula is worth trying.

videos.title: Eat This Part of Watermelon — Your Body Will Thank You
videos.summary_source_text:
Eat This Part of Watermelon — Your Body Will Thank You Most people eat watermelon for the sweet red flesh, but they’re throwing away the most powerful part. That white rind just beneath the skin is loaded with citrulline, an amino acid that converts into arginine and boosts nitric oxide in the body. This helps open your blood vessels, improve circulation, support heart health, and naturally lower blood pressure. Watermelon is also rich in lycopene, antioxidants, and hydration that benefit your skin, metabolism, and overall health. Before you toss that rind, learn why this overlooked part of watermelon may be the key to better blood flow and a healthier body.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

Build your own AI agent in under 60 seconds. In this video, we explore how BlueStacks AI turns OpenClaw—a powerful open-source AI assistant—into a simple, one-click install with no coding required.

OpenClaw is an autonomous AI agent that can perform real-world tasks like browsing the web, managing files, and automating workflows using models like GPT, Claude, and Gemini . But traditionally, setting it up requires Docker, Node.js, and complex configuration.

That’s where BlueStacks AI changes everything.

videos.title: TOUCHDOWN IN CHI-TOWN! Hurricanes Rout the Blackhawks 7-2
videos.summary_source_text:
TOUCHDOWN IN CHI-TOWN! Hurricanes Rout the Blackhawks 7-2 The Carolina Hurricanes begin their four-game road trip with a dominating 7-2 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Thursday night. Logan Stankoven with three points, Mark Jankowski with two goals, and William Carrier with three assists. What else stood out in the win? Also, we have more awards being handed out and nominated for. On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' rout of the Blackhawks. On a night where everyone contributed and checked off milestones, what stood out? How was it a complete dominance by the Canes with seven of their regulars out? Secondly, Zach reacts to what Rod Brind'Amour stated postgame following the win. How did the head coach feel about his team winning big, even with seven non-regulars in the lineup? Finally, Jordan Staal was awarded the Steve Chaisson Award, while Jaccob Slavin was nominated for the King Clancy Award. What does it mean for both guys? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Cole Caufield Notches 50 Goals ft. Marco D'Amico | The Sheet with Jeff Marek
videos.summary_source_text:
Cole Caufield Notches 50 Goals ft. Marco D'Amico | The Sheet with Jeff Marek Jeff Marek hosts The Sheet for Friday, April 10 and kicks off the show with a look around the NHL as the playoff picture continues to take shape. Marek congratulates the Pittsburgh Penguins and the Utah Mammoth after both teams officially clinch spots in the postseason before turning the focus to a historic night in Montreal.

Joining the show is Marco D'Amico of RG Media to break down Cole Caufield scoring his 50th goal of the season, becoming the first player for the Montreal Canadiens to reach the milestone since Stéphane Richer in 1989–90. The two discuss the electric atmosphere at the Bell Centre, Caufield’s development under head coach Martin St. Louis, and why his offensive breakout could be sustainable moving forward.

The conversation also dives into the continued growth of Canadiens captain Nick Suzuki, the impact of young stars like Juraj Slafkovský and Lane Hutson, and what this new core means for the future of hockey in Montreal. Marek and D’Amico also discuss the unique pressure and history that comes with playing in one of hockey’s most iconic markets.

From playoff races to Canadiens history and everything in between, it’s another packed edition of The Sheet.

Subscribe to the Daily Faceoff YouTube channel for more NHL coverage, interviews, and daily hockey conversation.

videos.title: 50-Goal Cole & The Penguins Are Back In The Playoffs! | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
50-Goal Cole & The Penguins Are Back In The Playoffs! | Daily Faceoff Live Welcome to Daily Faceoff Live!

Cole Caufield has made history in Montreal — and the playoff picture continues to shift across the NHL.

Today we break down Cole Caufield becoming the first Montreal Canadien since 1990 to score 50 goals in a season, and what his milestone says about the Canadiens' growing depth — including another strong season from Juraj Slafkovský.

We also take a look at the Ottawa Senators inching closer to a playoff berth, with their odds climbing to 92% after a key win — while Detroit’s late push might be coming just a little too late.

Plus, the Pittsburgh Penguins are back in the Stanley Cup Playoffs for the first time since 2021–22. We dive into what fueled their turnaround, Sidney Crosby’s motivation to bring playoff hockey back to Pittsburgh, and why this team might be more dangerous than expected — even if some of their success raises sustainability questions.

videos.title: Never Ever Rush The Puck
videos.summary_source_text:
Never Ever Rush The Puck Want to learn how to rush the puck like an NHL defensemen? This breakdown will show you exactly how to do that and the mechanics you need to find that standard.

In this video , we'll break down the three essential elements that make a successful puck rush: the pickup, initial deception, and final deception.  The first key aspect is the pickup, which involves a good head check and utilizing a Shuffle technique. By checking your surroundings and employing a Shuffle maneuver, you ensure that you have the necessary time and space to execute the rush effectively.

Once you've completed the pickup, it's time for the initial deception. Here, we introduce the use of crosses. By employing crosses immediately after the Shuffle, you create an angle that forces the defender to react and make a decision. This element sets the foundation for a successful rush.

The third and final element is the use of a soft drag or an anchor. This technique is crucial in beating the defender and advancing toward the goal. It involves a medium-speed shoulder check, followed by a Shuffle, crosses, and then executing the anchor or soft drag move.

videos.title: 10 Minutes Of Rory McIlroy Tracers
videos.summary_source_text:
10 Minutes Of Rory McIlroy Tracers 10 minutes of Rory McIlroy 's best tee shots on the DP World Tour between 2024 and 2026. 

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. WeFi is one of the world’s first deobanking platforms, combining traditional banking and decentralized finance into a single, compliant, and intuitive experience. The platform makes crypto as easy to use as traditional banking, without requiring blockchain knowledge.

Users can access everyday banking products while seamlessly using crypto in real life – including spending crypto as fiat, making cross-border payments, and storing crypto for long-term value. Security, compliance, and customer protection are core to WeFi’s principles.

videos.title: Sakta ner och slå ngre…
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
Sakta ner och slå ngre… Vill vi öka hastigheten på klubbhuvudet kan vi inte bara öka hastigheten på allting. Vi behöver sakta ner stora delar av kroppen för att öka hastigheten där vi behöver den som bäst. #golf #golfswing #golftips 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook. Vill vi öka hastigheten på klubbhuvudet kan vi inte bara öka hastigheten på allting. Vi behöver sakta ner stora delar av kroppen för att öka hastigheten där vi behöver den som bäst. #golf #golfswing #golftips

videos.title: I Tested 24 AI Models on OpenClaw
videos.summary_source_text:
I Tested 24 AI Models on OpenClaw ✨ Join my community and chat about OpenClaw 🦞 https://mrc.fm/cmc

I tested 24 AI models on OpenClaw to find out which one has the best personality, tool calling and speed now that Anthropic killed Claude Max subscriptions. I used Claude Code to spin up sub agents and run every model on exactly the same health AI prompt, blind tested with code names so there's no bias. I compared Ollama, OpenRouter, OpenAI Codex, xAI, Anthropic API and even self hosted models, broke down the costs and ranked them all in a tier list from D to S. The results genuinely surprised me and the winner isn't what you'd expect.

0:00 Intro & The OpenClaw Problem
0:22 The AI Experiment Setup
2:28 Ollama Cloud Plans ($20/mo)
5:04 OpenRouter & Xiaomi Test
6:48 Grok Beta Tool Calling Test
7:55 OpenAI & Anthropic API Costs
9:08 The Results & Tier List Setup
10:13 C & D Tier Models
12:10 B Tier Models
13:54 A Tier Models
14:53 S Tier Models
16:00 The Ultimate Claude Alternative

videos.title: I Wish I Knew This Pitching Drill Years Ago | Completely Changed My Short Game
videos.summary_source_text:
I Wish I Knew This Pitching Drill Years Ago | Completely Changed My Short Game A while back Ping did research on chipping and pitching and found the best players get the club to first touch the ground within about an inch of the ball—and in my opinion that’s the #1 skill for great short game. In this video I show you my penny drill (two pennies = about that 1" window) and how I score it over 20 reps so you can actually measure progress instead of guessing. 

Then I share the counterintuitive pieces that made me way more consistent: a small weight shift instead of locking everything still, letting the club release instead of holding angles. Using a Blue Brick as a guide to keep the club more “on top” (not dragged from the inside). This is a game changer. Check it out here 🔗➡️ https://bit.ly/bluebrickgolf

00:55 Track Your Coin Score
01:16 Add a Small Weight Shift
03:51 Flow Beats Locked In

videos.title: The ONLY 5 Supplements You Actually Need (Stop Wasting Money)
videos.summary_source_text:
The ONLY 5 Supplements You Actually Need (Stop Wasting Money) What are the best supplements to take? Discover the top supplements to take for optimal health and nutrition, and the supplement mistakes to avoid that could cost more than just your wallet. Add these 5 essential supplements to your regimen today.

0:00 Introduction: The top supplements for health
1:03 Vitamin D benefits 
2:36 How much vitamin D3 do I need?
3:17 Magnesium benefits 
5:50 Electrolytes benefits
7:36 Omega-3 benefits
9:14 Trace minerals 
11:17 Supplement mistakes 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/47TsrbP

Keep watching to learn more about specific vitamins to take and avoid:
▶️ https://youtu.be/1gGI_98xzgE
▶️ https://youtu.be/TZ0Dm6ULLAw
▶️ https://youtu.be/P9XwBGk3ZiQ

The RDA for most important supplements is too low, or only represents the bare minimum requirement to avoid deficiency. You often need significantly more to create a therapeutic effect.

Vitamin D is arguably the most important vitamin for your health. Most people do not get enough, and with chronic health conditions, the need increases. Vitamin D can improve your mood, cognitive function, reduce lower back pain, and decrease the risk of cancer.

Magnesium is one of the most important minerals for your health. It is vital for vitamin D function, energy production, sleep, and more.

You need 4700 mg of potassium each day, and most people are deficient. Potassium can help support healthy blood sugar and blood pressure levels.

Many one-a-day vitamins are unnecessary. They often contain cheap, synthetic ingredients and fillers that do not benefit your health and may even make matters worse. 

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 60, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

X: https://x.com/dr_ericberg

Disclaimer: 
Dr. Eric Berg received his Doctor of Chiropractic degree from Palmer College of Chiropractic in 1988. His use of “doctor” or “Dr.” in relation to himself solely refers to that degree. Dr. Berg is a licensed chiropractor in Virginia, California, and Louisiana, but he no longer practices chiropractic in any state and does not see patients, so he can focus on educating people as a full-time activity, yet he maintains an active license. This video is for general informational purposes only. It should not be used to self-diagnose, and it is not a substitute for a medical exam, cure, treatment, diagnosis, prescription, or recommendation. It does not create a doctor-patient relationship between Dr. Berg and you. You should not make any change in your health regimen or diet before first consulting a physician and obtaining a medical exam, diagnosis, and recommendation. Always seek the advice of a physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.title: Idag släpps vår bok Burgare: Så gör du världens bästa burgare hemma!

Idag släpps vår bok Burgare: Så gör du världens bästa burgare hemma, och vi är så otroligt stolta över den! Hitta recept på burgare, bröd, såser och efterrätter, samt en rejäl teknikdel där vi delar med oss av alla våra bästa tips.

Lär dig mala ditt eget kött, hur du borde hålla i burgaren och laga en magisk baconsylt. Dessutom har vi en massiv burgarguide över Sveriges och världens bästa burgare!

Alla kan göra en 5/5-burgare hemma. It's burger time!

Finns i en bokhandel nära dig. 👉 https://www.adlibris.com/sv/bok/burgare-sa-gor-du-varldens-basta-burgare-hemma-9789127191211

videos.title: Another day, another AMAZING Vejmelka leg save! 🇨🇿🥬
videos.summary_source_text:
Another day, another AMAZING Vejmelka leg save! 🇨🇿🥬 Just when you think Karel Vejmelka is done adding to his highlight reel, he goes and does THIS! The man they call Veggie STONES Zachary L'Heureux in tight with his left pad, preserving a Mammoth lead that they do not relinquish in an eventual 4-1 victory. Vejmelka's efforts help Utah clinch a playoff berth for the first time in franchise history!
