videos.title: Avalanche Defeat Calgary and Lock Up the Presidents' Trophy
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Defeat Calgary and Lock Up the Presidents' Trophy Colorado Avalanche clinch the President’s Trophy with a tense win over the Calgary Flames—can MacKinnon and company carry their dominance into the Stanley Cup playoffs?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the Avalanche’s wire-to-wire season, highlighting Nathan MacKinnon’s fiery playmaking, Gabe Landeskog’s clutch moments, and Martin Necas’s growth towards a 100-point campaign. The conversation tackles the myth of the Presidents' Trophy “curse,” the high-stakes challenge for home ice advantage, Jared Bednar’s critical coaching decisions, and Mackenzie Blackwood’s strong goaltending performance. Insightful analysis covers Avalanche’s defensive improvements, their power play precision, and how recent matchup history with the Flames sets the stage for playoff intensity.

Will the Avalanche prove themselves as one of the best teams of the salary cap era? Get the inside scoop on their postseason outlook and what fans can expect as the road to Stanley comes through Denver.

videos.title: Ludvig Jansson Makes His NHL Debut with the Florida Panthers in Ottawa
videos.summary_source_text:
Ludvig Jansson Makes His NHL Debut with the Florida Panthers in Ottawa Florida Panthers rookie defenseman Ludvig Jansson meets the media before his team lost 5-1 the host Ottawa Senators on Thursday, April 9, 2026. 

The Panthers lost both Seth Jones and Dmitry Kulikov to broken bones in Tuesday’s 4-3 shootout loss in Montreal. Jones has a fracture in his foot; Kulikov broke a finger. 

Florida has lost four straight (0-3-1) and had two rookie defensemen making their NHL debut in Marek Alscher and Jansson. 

The Panthers wrap their five-game road trip with in Toronto on Saturday. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

Anthropic just unveiled Claude Mythos Preview, and this thing looks like one of the most dangerous AI models we have seen yet. According to Anthropic, Mythos is strong enough at cyber offense that releasing it broadly right now would be reckless. It reportedly found major vulnerabilities across operating systems, browsers, and critical software, including bugs that had survived for decades. So this is bigger than another benchmark win.

videos.title: Alison Lukan on Ron Francis, Kraken Direction & NHL Front Office Evolution | The Sheet
videos.summary_source_text:
Alison Lukan on Ron Francis, Kraken Direction & NHL Front Office Evolution | The Sheet Jeff Marek and Greg Wyshynski welcome Seattle Kraken analyst Alison Lukan to The Sheet to break down the biggest questions surrounding the Kraken organization following the news around Ron Francis and the direction of the franchise. Lukan discusses whether the criticism of Francis for a lack of “bold moves” is fair, the original five-year plan for the expansion franchise, and how the team’s early playoff success may have actually altered that long-term strategy. The conversation also explores the importance of decision-making structure in modern NHL front offices, the balance between hockey experience and analytics, and how organizations are evolving as the business side of the sport grows.

They also dive into the Kraken roster, the impact of players like Matty Beniers, Brandon Montour, Philipp Grubauer, and the debate around the Chandler Stephenson contract. Lukan shares insight into the culture being built in Seattle, the growth of youth hockey in the market, and how the franchise is positioning itself long-term with Todd Leiweke and ownership looking to push the organization forward.

From front office philosophy to expansion team realities and the future of the Kraken, this is a deep dive into one of the NHL’s most interesting organizations.

Subscribe to the Daily Faceoff YouTube channel for more NHL analysis, interviews, and daily hockey coverage.

#NHL #SeattleKraken #RonFrancis #JeffMarek #GregWyshynski #AlisonLukan #Hockey #DailyFaceoff #TheSheet #NHLNews #MattyBeniers #BrandonMontour #PhilippGrubauer #ChandlerStephenson

videos.title: Slow down and gain distance…
videos.channel: Better & Easier golf with your guide Marcus Edblad
videos.summary_source_text:
Slow down and gain distance… If we want more distance we all need to understand the mechanics that speed up the club head and not just try to speed up everything. #golftips #golfswing #golf

0:00 Intro to slow down to gain distance

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Let me help you get an effortless golfswing with speed, distance and accuracy. I call it the circle of speed. A good release will help you to a better impact and longer drives and irons without slice and hook. How to swing a golf club need to be adjusted to your skill level and experience. 

Long and straight is the goal for everyone but it takes time. Try to focus on one thing not everything when you practise. Impact, face control and swingpath will always be the most important part to drill. We focus too much on rotation but no good golf shot will be executed just by rotating. 

We also need to understand that many myths in golf are misleading. Everything that you find on the internet isn’t true. Ben Hogan, Sam Snead are two of the legends that are often misunderstood.  To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out. 

A will never call a slice sexy but a high draw is beautiful in a very special way. Some pro's that hit draw: Rory McIroy, Xander Schauffele, Patrick Reed, Sepp Straka, Bryson Dechambeau  and many, many more. 

We shall not keep our head still, only start with the hips, look only at the ball or keep the left or right arm straight. Understand what do do with the club and let your body find the best way possible. 

This is not Rick Shiels, Saguto golf, Danny Maude, Meandmygolf, the Average Golfer, Malaska, Mark Crossfield, Alex Elliot Golf or Paige Spiranac. This is a method that anyone can learn if you give it a chance. 

If you use callaway, ping, titleist, takomo or taylor made clubs doesn’t matter you can learn to hit good golf shots. Your loft or your shaft on the club will not change but you can always get better. 

Find what inspires you. Golf basics are the same for everyone. The pga tour, longdrivers or other good golfers can all help you find better golf shots. Watch what they do instead of listed to what they say. Listen mostly to your body and figure out what you need to do to produce the same results as the pros on TV. Be careful when you watch a golf swing in slow motion. The result isn't always what the golfer is trying to do. Feel and real are seldom the same. 

We can find inspiration in a lot of things. You can find training motivation watching movies like Rocky, Tin Cup or Happy Gilmore and find mental inspiration in legends like Arnold Schwarzenegger, Hulk Hogan, Sylvester Stallone or Mike Tyson. Maybe we sometimes need to hear about crazy achievements from people like David Goggins, Jocko Willink, Ct Fletcher, Jim Rohn or Tony Robbins. 

Mike Malaska, Mike Austin, Mike Dunaway, Pete Cowen and Steve Pratt are some of my favorite golf instructors online. Find the tips that make your golf better. Decide what you want to hit. I teach a draw but many like a fade and nobody likes a hook or slice. 

Your hips or your lag is not the key to golf. Your hands will decide the shot and you can do like Tiger Woods and trust your hands. Teach your hands to hit different shots. Hit big hooks and slices to understand what happens. Only straight is not gonna teach you anything. 

Bryson Dechambeu and Kyle Birkshire can inspire you to hit it longer. Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson can give you inspiration and motivation to test new things and new golf shots. Linn Grant, Viktor Hovland and Ludvig Aberg can show you the future of golf. 

The Masters, Players Championship, The Players, The Open and US Open can make you love golf even more. See the best in the world solve all the problems we all need to master any golf course. Golf is a craft and you need fantasy, feel and skills to master it.

Questions my videos will answer:

How to swing faster. How to hit longer. How to swing faster. How to hit your irons better. How to be better at anything. How to master the circle of speed. How to get a better short game. How to hit your wedge better. How to release the golf club. How to rotate in golf. Best tips for beginner golfers. How to hit down on the ball. How to hit up on the ball. How to rotate hips in the golf swing. How to hit straight every time. How to stop slicing. How to swing effortlessly. 

#subscribe #golftips #pga  #hurricane 


Filmed with Iphone 15 pro or Iphone 17 If we want more distance we all need to understand the mechanics that speed up the club head and not just try to speed up everything. #golftips #golfswing #golf

videos.title: Puffy Face? Fix It FAST (3 Minutes)
videos.summary_source_text:
Puffy Face? Fix It FAST (3 Minutes) If your face looks puffy, tired, or older than it should, it may not just be aging, it could be fluid buildup, poor circulation, and sluggish lymphatic drainage. In this video, I’ll show you a simple 3 minute technique using gentle massage, muscle activation, and lymphatic stimulation to help move trapped fluid, increase blood flow, and naturally support collagen production. This can help your face look more lifted, firmer, and refreshed without creams or invasive treatments. When you improve circulation and encourage proper drainage, you’re delivering more oxygen and nutrients to the skin while helping remove waste that contributes to puffiness, dullness, and premature aging. Do this daily or every other day and you may start to see and feel a noticeable difference in your skin’s tone, texture, and overall appearance.

Olive oil.

Olive oil.

videos.title: Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Lose Seth Jones, 2 Make NHL Debut at Ottawa Senators
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Lose Seth Jones, 2 Make NHL Debut at Ottawa Senators Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media before his team plays the host Ottawa Senators on Thursday, April 9, 2026. 

The Panthers lost both Seth Jones and Dmitry Kulikov to broken bones in Tuesday’s 4-3 shootout loss in Montreal. Jones has a fracture in his foot; Kulikov broke a finger. 

Florida has lost three straight and will have two rookie defensemen making their NHL debut tonight in Marek Alscher and Ludvig Jansson. 

The Panthers continue their five-game road trip with Game 3 in Ottawa on Thursday. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

The Panthers lost both Seth Jones and Dmitry Kulikov to broken bones in Tuesday’s 4-3 shootout loss in Montreal. Jones has a fracture in his foot; Kulikov broke a finger. 

Florida has lost three straight and will have two rookie defensemen making their NHL debut tonight in Marek Alscher and Ludvig Jansson. 

The Panthers continue their five-game road trip with Game 3 in Ottawa on Thursday.

videos.title: The WEIRDEST Putter At The 2026 MASTERS!
videos.summary_source_text:
The WEIRDEST Putter At The 2026 MASTERS! Rick takes a closer look at the Golfyr Maker Tour Putter — one of the most unique (and expensive) putters he’s ever had in his hands. Made famous by Sergio Garcia, this isn’t your typical flatstick, and in this review Rick puts it to the test to see if the performance matches the price and the bold design.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Feel This For Maximum Driver Distance and Consistency #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno
videos.summary_source_text:
Feel This For Maximum Driver Distance and Consistency #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

How to hit driver farther and straighter starts with one thing most amateurs are missing: a free release through impact. If you're losing distance and missing weak right, this fixes it.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn 

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created 
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1 

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com 

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Learn:
• How to hit driver farther by learning the two-part release — toss and turn — that squares the face and delivers correct loft at impact
• Increase driver distance by eliminating the passive, hold-on swing pattern that robs you of club head speed and produces weak misses to the right
• Unlock how to release the golf club through a trail hand toss drill and lead arm rotation drill you can practice in minutes on the range
• Fix your golf swing with the same driver release cues Eric used with a real student to turn a weak right miss into a solid, center-fairway drive
• Apply two targeted golf drills — right hand only and left arm only — specifically designed to build driver release feel before you hit full shots
• Build the driver golf swing pattern seen in elite ball strikers: club head progressively releasing, passing the hands, and producing high, powerful drives
• Stop the weak right miss for good — the most common high handicap golfer driver problem — and start hitting it higher, farther, and straighter

Want to increase driver distance and finally fix that weak, short miss to the right? In this golf lesson, golf swing coach Eric Cogorno reveals the exact two-part release pattern — toss with the trail hand, turn with the lead arm — that the best drivers of the ball use to square the face and deliver power through impact. Most golf swing tips tell you to rotate your body harder. Eric shows you what your arms and hands actually need to do with the driver — and backs it up with golf swing analysis of real student results and PGA Tour player comparisons. Whether you're a high handicap golfer trying to keep it in play or an experienced player chasing more yards, this is the driver fix you've been looking for.

videos.title: 462. Börsen just nu: hur påverkar händelserna i Iran börsen? | Livepodd med André Granström
videos.summary_source_text:
462. Börsen just nu: hur påverkar händelserna i Iran börsen? | Livepodd med André Granström Hur ska man agera när marknaden är orolig? Vad säger forskningen? Vad kostar det att sitta med torrt krut i ladorna? Vad säger olje-, aktie-, råvaru- och räntemarknaden? Varför är det ett så stort problem med Hormuz-sundet? Hur hänger allting ihop - allt från olje till matpriserna? Ja, det är några av sakerna som jag och André Granström tog upp på vår live-podd i tisdags 7 april.

Här får du inspelningen som vi gjorde i tisdags (7 april). Även om vissa saker har vi fått facit på sedan dess - t.ex. vapenvilan mellan Iran och USA - så upplever jag att många av sakerna vi pratade om fortfarande är högst relevanta både idag och framgent.

Framförallt i den första delen pratar vi om bl.a.:

▸ Hur har det gått de senaste 12 månaderna sedan Trumps tullar
▸ Att det är normalt att börsen backar med -14% inom ett år (även de år det går plus)
▸ Sannolikheten att gå plus per sparhorisont
▸ Börsen 12 månader efter en geopolitisk händelse
▸Att nedgångar är vanliga, men stora nedgångar är ovanliga
▸ Snittavkastning 1, 3 och 5 år efter en nedgång
▸ Sannolikhet att gå plus efter en nedgång
▸ Att tajma marknaden är extremt svårt
▸ Det är dyrt att stå utanför marknaden (“Myten om torrt krut”)

I den andra delen pratar vi mer om de olika sambanden:

▸ Vad som skiljer denna oljestörning från historiska
▸ Varför Hormuz-sundet är så viktigt
▸ Påverkan på t.ex. flygbränsle, naturgas, olja, plast och insatsvaror
▸ Den stora risken ingen pratar om - spannmålspriset
▸ Att Sverige är ett av länderna med bäst skydd
▸ Hur marknaden prisar in risken (vilket visade sig vara rätt med facit i hand)

Därutöver diskuterade vi en del frågor från publiken (tack till dig som deltog!). Du får gärna ge en tumme upp eller kommentar om du vill att vi ska göra fler sådana live-inspelningar. 🙂

Hälsningar,
Jan och André

Länkar:
====
▸ Andrés aktietipstjänst VQM: https://vqm.se/
▸ Diskussion i forumet där presentation från tillfället finns: https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t/120758

videos.title: ‪@Visa‬ x WeFi: The Future is in Stablecoin Payments Pt. 2
videos.summary_source_text:
‪@Visa‬ x WeFi: The Future is in Stablecoin Payments Pt. 2 The conversation continues. And this time, it gets into what all of this actually means for real people.
Alexandra Soroko (Growth Product & Partnerships, Visa) and Michael Batuev (Head of Global Payments, WeFi) are back for Episode 2 — going beyond infrastructure to tackle the questions driving the industry right now.

What we cover in Pt. 2:
- Does regulation help or slow adoption — and what MiCA and the GENIUS Act actually mean for the market
- Why $905 billion in annual remittances highlights exactly what stablecoins are built to fix
- Which geographies are moving fastest, and why emerging markets stand to benefit most
- How corporate use cases, from cash management to intercompany transfers, are quietly becoming a major growth frontier
- Why confidence from regulatory clarity is what brings traditional financial institutions into the stablecoin space at scale

The strongest financial innovations don't just disrupt what exists.
They make it work better for more people. Stablecoins are already enabling near-instant, low-cost cross-border settlement, without the layers of intermediaries that slow down money and drive up costs.

At WeFi, we're not watching this happen. We're building on it as the leading Deobanking infrastructure provider, working with organisations like Visa to bring stablecoins from theory into real, practical utility. Cards, accounts, global payments, and real financial services, all powered by infrastructure designed to reward the people who use it.

The story doesn't stop here. There is more to come.

🔔 Subscribe and stay tuned as we continue to bring together the industry's most important players to discuss where global payments and banking go next.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: Could this FIX your putting 🤯
videos.summary_source_text:
Could this FIX your putting 🤯 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Why I’d NEVER buy a £300,000 Bentley...
videos.summary_source_text:
Why I’d NEVER buy a £300,000 Bentley... Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Car-Vertical

Welcome to the carwow review of the new Bentley Bentayga Speed! 

We’re putting this all-new, luxurious SUV to the test to see if it can still hold its own against the flashiest rivals on the planet, such as the Lamborghini Urus, Ferrari Purosangue, or the ultra-opulent Rolls-Royce Cullinan. 

While the Urus is a track-focused weapon and the Cullinan is a literal palace on wheels, the Bentayga Speed tries to occupy the sweet spot in the middle. But does it offer enough for you to choose it over its rivals? Let's take a closer look...

At first glance, you might think not much has changed because it shares the same iconic body, grille, and bonnet as the previous model. However, the Speed hallmarks appear upon closer inspection. To differentiate it from the standard V8, Bentley has swapped out the traditional chrome for a sleek, blacked-out trim across the exterior. This model also marks the first time you can spec massive 23” alloy wheels that fill the arches perfectly. Our test car even features the optional carbon fibre side skirts, a chunky roof spoiler, and a vocal Akrapovič exhaust system!

Bentley continues to set the bar for cabin quality, and every single element you touch feels expensive - we couldn't even find any wonky stitching! The cabin is a masterclass in textures, blending high-end Leather and Alcantara with stunning wood trim. While the digital dials look great and modern, Bentley has wisely kept physical dials for the climate control, making it far easier to use on the move than its touch-screen-only rivals. The infotainment system is also intuitive enough to ensure the tech never gets in the way of the luxury.

The biggest news for the new Bentayga Speed is under the bonnet, where the legendary 6-litre W12 has been replaced by a downsized 4-litre V8. Interestingly, Bentley has avoided adding any hybrid power here, keeping it as a pure internal combustion engine producing 650hp and 850Nm of torque. Even though it has lost four cylinders, it has not lost its punch. It is now lighter over the front end, making it feel more agile than ever, while the Akrapovič exhaust ensures it sounds just as mean as the old twelve-cylinder.

All of this luxury comes with a high price tag. While the standard Bentayga starts at £172,600, the Speed model featured in this video comes in at a cool £290,295 thanks to a staggering £70,000 worth of options! But is it the smart choice over its close rivals? Stick around and see for yourself!

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0904

videos.title: 4 TO GO IN CHICAGO! Carolina Hurricanes Start 4-Game Road Trip Against the Blackhawks
videos.summary_source_text:
4 TO GO IN CHICAGO! Carolina Hurricanes Start 4-Game Road Trip Against the Blackhawks The Carolina Hurricanes begin their four-game road trip to finish off the regular season against the Chicago Blackhawks. Can they keep the winning ways going as they are still in pursuit of the number one seed in the Eastern Conference? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes calling up four players from the Chicago Wolves ahead of their game against the Blackhawks. Since the AHL club is close by, why does it make sense to call up some of their younger players to give veterans some rest? What could the lines look like on Thursday night that'll include the call-ups? Secondly, Zach goes over the tale of the tape between the two sides. Who has the edge? What could the potential goalie matchup be in Chicago? Finally, Zach picks his Canes to Click as a scorer against the Blackhawks. Who could it be? He will share his thoughts on what fans should expect with four games remaining before the playoffs. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Avalanche First Round Preferences. What Are the Good / Bad Matchups?
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche First Round Preferences. What Are the Good / Bad Matchups? Colorado Avalanche await their wild card opponent as the Western Conference playoff race heats up. With the Nashville Predators, Los Angeles Kings, San Jose Sharks, and Winnipeg Jets in contention, which matchup would give Nathan MacKinnon and Cale Makar the smoothest path forward—or present a surprising first-round hurdle?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the strengths and weaknesses of each wild card contender, from the Kings’ overtime struggles to the Sharks’ high-scoring youth. The hosts dissect Colorado’s favorable records against potential rivals, analyze key playoff metrics like regulation wins, and debate which team poses the toughest challenge—will Connor Hellebuyck and the Jets’ defensive grit disrupt the Avs’ Stanley Cup quest? 

Plus, discussion turns to Gabriel Landeskog’s Bill Masterton Award nomination and what it means for the Avalanche captain’s inspiring comeback. Don’t miss the pulse on the Avs’ playoff outlook and postseason preferences.

videos.title: This is What Separates Amateurs From Professionals
videos.summary_source_text:
This is What Separates Amateurs From Professionals The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: This SHOCKED me...Graphite v Steel Shaft Test
videos.summary_source_text:
This SHOCKED me...Graphite v Steel Shaft Test This SHOCKED me… I tested graphite vs steel shafts to see which actually performs better and the results were not what I expected.

In this video, I put both shafts head-to-head to compare:

Distance
Accuracy
Ball flight
Feel & consistency

Most golfers think they know which shaft is best… but after this test, you might completely rethink your setup.If you’re trying to gain distance, tighten dispersion, or finally understand which shaft suits your swing this is a must-watch.

Inside this video:

Real on-course / launch monitor data
Honest performance breakdown
Who should use graphite vs steel
Common mistakes golfers make when choosing shafts

videos.title: Claude Managed Agents: OpenClaw Is In Trouble
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Managed Agents: OpenClaw Is In Trouble Anthropic just dropped Claude Managed Agents and I think this is why they killed OpenClaw's Claude access. I've been running AI agents on my own servers for months - health coaches, social media bots, crypto agents - all on OpenClaw  with a whole DIY stack. Today I tried rebuilding my Oura Ring health agent using Managed Agents and it took minutes instead of days. Secure sandboxing, long running sessions, multi agent coordination, full tracing... all built in. But can it fully replace OpenClaw? I found one big catch. Watch to find out.

📖 Read the announcement: https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents

00:00 Intro: Why Anthropic Killed OpenClaw
00:14 Introducing Claude Managed Agents
00:36 Building an Oura Health Coach Agent
01:44 Secure Cloud Environments Setup
02:49 Adding the API Token

videos.title: Why You Miss Your Irons Left and Right
videos.summary_source_text:
Why You Miss Your Irons Left and Right Stop guessing what to work on in your golf game. Build your Personal Game Plan with Me and My Golf  👉 https://meandmygolf.com/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=08.04.26

Tom’s swing actually looked really good.
Good path. On plane. Solid motion.
But he was missing his irons left… then right… and had no idea why.
In this live lesson, we break down the real reason golfers struggle with inconsistent iron direction — and it’s not what most people think.
The issue wasn’t his swing path.
It was his clubface.
With one simple grip adjustment, we eliminated the left miss immediately, made his ball flight predictable, and then rebuilt his release to turn pushes into controlled draws.
If you:
•⁠  ⁠Miss your irons both ways
•⁠  ⁠Fight a pull or hook
•⁠  ⁠Feel like your swing is close but your direction isn’t
This lesson will show you what to check first.
Let us know in the comments — do you miss more left or right with your irons?

videos.title: I Played the Most DANGEROUS Golf Course in the World!
videos.summary_source_text:
I Played the Most DANGEROUS Golf Course in the World! Rick Shiels plays Skukuza Golf Course deep inside South Africa's Kruger National Park — where hippos, lions, elephants and giraffes roam freely across the fairways. There are no fences, no barriers, and absolutely no guarantee you'll finish your round without a close encounter. This might be the most incredible and terrifying round of golf ever filmed.

Sign up to Creator Golf Club here: https://www.creatorgolfclub.com/?utm_source=rickshiels&utm_medium=yt

Check out Kruger Golf Safaris here: https://www.krugergolfsafaris.com

https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)

Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

videos.title: Alex Noren & Marco Penge: Augusta Insights & Preparing for a First Masters
videos.summary_source_text:
Alex Noren & Marco Penge: Augusta Insights & Preparing for a First Masters Alex Noren and Marco Penge join George Harper Jr. in Kentucky at the home of Buffalo Trace for a special edition of the Life on Tour podcast, presented by Buffalo Trace.

With The Masters just around the corner, both players look ahead to Augusta National in what promises to be one of the most exciting weeks in golf. Alex draws on his experience from four previous appearances, sharing insights into what makes the course so unique, the challenges it presents, and what it really feels like to compete on one of the game’s biggest stages.

Marco, preparing for his first Masters, opens up about the excitement of making his debut. From anticipation to nerves, he discusses what it means to earn his place in the field and the emotions of stepping onto such an iconic course for the very first time.

Please drink responsibly, for further health information visit drinkaware.co.uk.

videos.title: OpenAI Just Made History (Holy Sh*t?!)
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenAI Just Made History (Holy Sh*t?!) OpenAI just made history with the largest raise by any company ever. 

They recently raised $122 billion at a staggering $852 billion valuation, reportedly generating $2 billion in revenue every month.

At the same time, reports revealed that Sora was losing roughly $1 million per day—totaling over a third of a billion dollars—before it was shut down a couple weeks ago.

These two pieces of news coming out at the same time is kind of giving me whiplash, but I'm also not surprised by either. 

To stay up-to-date with all the latest AI news each week, check out my latest YouTube video for more!

videos.title: Your Tight Muscles May Not Need More Stretching
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Tight Muscles May Not Need More Stretching If stretching only gives temporary relief, the problem may not be your muscles.
 In this video, I explore why tightness is often not just a muscle issue, but a nervous system pattern of protection — and why pushing harder, stretching more, or forcing change often does not create lasting ease.
Instead, I guide you through a gentle awareness-based exploration so you can begin sensing tightness in a different way.
If you’d like to go deeper into this work, here’s my free somatic masterclass:
Free Somatic Masterclass — Move More Freely in Your Body
Watch here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

If you feel ready for structured guidance and deeper support in changing long-standing movement patterns, you can learn more about working with me here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

Taro is a nervous system movement coach helping self-aware adults who have lost trust in their bodies due to past traumas and limiting beliefs go from feeling disconnected and fearful in their restricted lives to experiencing profound reconnection with their bodies, enabling them to move freely and joyfully through nervous system learning and guided somatic movement practices.

videos.title: DRINK 1 CUP A DAY to Unclog Your Arteries
videos.summary_source_text:
DRINK 1 CUP A DAY to Unclog Your Arteries This artery cleansing drink is like exercise in a cup! Unclog arteries and support cardiovascular health with one cup of this amazing drink daily. Reverse arterial plaque and prevent a heart attack naturally!

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr.Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/488xOUn

Want to improve cardiovascular health naturally and effectively? Watch these videos next:
▶️ https://youtu.be/fqwrf0RvOVI
▶️ https://youtu.be/HLrMpB5Bgtk
▶️ https://youtu.be/AtBElcAs6H0

0:00 Introduction: How to unclog arteries naturally
0:33 What causes clogged arteries?
2:21 How to increase nitric oxide
3:00 How to reverse clogged arteries
8:35 The best drink to unclog arteries
10:33 More cacao benefits  

If you have damage to your arteries, you’re at an increased risk for high blood pressure and clots, which can cause strokes and heart attacks. When you visit the doctor for these conditions, they typically address the symptoms rather than examining the root cause.

The root cause of plaque in the arteries is endothelial damage. Endothelial damage and inflammation are repaired by plaque, composed of calcium, cholesterol, and protein.

Arterial damage decreases nitric oxide levels, resulting in less control over blood pressure and an increased risk of clotting. Around 90% of heart attacks come from clots!

Sunlight is vital to increase nitric oxide. Nasal breathing and magnesium are also essential.

You can reverse arterial plaque buildup through a process called reverse cholesterol transport. This mechanism transports plaque in the arteries back to the liver for recycling. This process can be sped up with the help of the following:
•Niacin  
•HDL cholesterol
•Exercise 
•Fasting 
•Low-carb diets 
•Bile salts 

Magnesium controls calcium, so increasing your intake can help to remove it from the arteries. Polyphenols protect the endothelial layer of the arteries, and vitamin K2 helps prevent arterial calcification.  
 
Cacao powder is the main component of the best drink for your arteries. It’s high in flavonols and stimulates enzymes in the body to produce more nitric oxide. Roasted cacao has been shown to increase blood flow to the arteries, similar to the effects of exercise.

Cacao is also beneficial for your heart, brain, skin, and other organs and tissues in the body. It has an accumulative effect and can build up in your system over time. 

To prepare your drink, combine cacao powder in a glass of water. You can drink it cold or warm. Add beetroot juice powder for an additional boost of nitric oxide and an interesting flavor. You can also add a pinch of sea salt and a scoop of magnesium glycinate for the most potent effect! 

DATA:
https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/british-journal-of-nutrition/article/cocoa-flavanol-intake-improves-endothelial-function-and-framingham-risk-score-in-healthy-men-and-women-a-randomised-controlled-doublemasked-trial-the-flaviola-health-study/C2168228B1D501677F4E304997ACAABC 
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0271531715002699

videos.title: Hot vs Cold Shower: Which One Should You ACTUALLY Take?
videos.summary_source_text:
Hot vs Cold Shower: Which One Should You ACTUALLY Take? Which is better for recovery, a cold shower or a hot one? In this video, we’ll compare cold vs. hot shower recovery after a workout to see how they stack up. I’ll also share the best recovery method after a workout that many people don’t know about!

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

DNA TEST LINK (USA ONLY): https://3x4genetics.com/DRBERG-PDF
Use access code [DRBERG-PDF] to receive your complimentary PDF report.

0:00 Introduction: Cold shower vs. hot shower for muscle recovery
0:20 Cold shower benefits 
1:02 Hot shower benefits 
1:26 Natural muscle recovery tips 
2:20 The best recovery method after a workout
5:33 Enhancing muscle recovery 

👉 Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/3Q9eP61

Keep watching for more ways to boost energy, improve recovery, and support your overall health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/vWrzH4IBs-Q
▶️ https://youtu.be/xpU4JrUgqMw
▶️ https://youtu.be/O1zKV3eqevc

Today, we’re going to compare cold showers vs. hot showers for muscle recovery. Surprisingly, cold therapy can slow down the benefits of exercise! In cases of overtraining, swelling, or pain, cold therapy can be beneficial. 

While cold therapy may not be the best for muscle recovery, there are many cold shower benefits, such as improved cognitive and immune function. 

Hot showers provide more muscle relaxation, blood flow, and oxygen. They relax the parasympathetic nervous system and can improve sleep quality by 20%. A hot shower is a better option for a muscle recovery shower. 

For both cold water and hot shower benefits, you can do both! This creates vasoconstriction followed by vasodilation, increasing blood flow to your muscles. 

Here are some great ways to enhance muscle recovery:
•Sauna followed by cold immersion therapy
•Foam roller 10 minutes after exercise 
•Get 8 hours of sleep
•Test DNA for optimal exercise and recovery plan  

Intermittent hypoxic training is one of the best things you can do for muscle recovery. This type of training involves restricting oxygen flow by using an air restriction mask or holding your breath. 

Intermittent hypoxic training mimics the effects of endurance training! It’s performed by elite athletes worldwide. It mimics a high-altitude environment, strengthens the metabolism, enhances muscle growth, and decreases inflammation. It also increases growth hormone, which has fat-burning, anti-aging, and muscle-building properties. 

🌟 Disclaimer from 3X4 Genetics: Data privacy is of utmost importance to us. videos.title: Give Me Just 13 Minutes And I'll Save You Years Of Bad Golf With Your Driver
videos.summary_source_text:
Give Me Just 13 Minutes And I'll Save You Years Of Bad Golf With Your Driver How to hit driver farther and straighter starts with one thing most amateurs are missing: a free release through impact. If you're losing distance and missing weak right, this fixes it.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn 

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created 
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1 

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com 

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

⏰ TIMESTAMPS: 
🏌️ 0:00 Why Your Driver Keeps Going Weak and Right — and How to Fix It 
⚡ 0:29 The "Toss and Turn" Driver Release Framework Explained 
🎯 0:58 Why an Open Club Face Is Killing Your Driver Distance 
💥 1:28 The Trail Hand Toss: The Key to Squaring Your Driver at Impact 
🔥 3:23 Right Hand Only Drill — 3 Reps to Feel the Driver Release 
⛳ 5:38 How to Use Ball Flight to Self-Diagnose Your Driver Problems 
✅ 6:03 Lead Arm Rotation: The Second Move That Adds Driver Distance 
🏆 7:55 Left Arm Only Drill — Groove the Turn for a More Powerful Driver 
🚀 9:17 Combining Toss and Turn for Maximum Driver Distance and Consistency 
💪 11:03 Why Letting the Club Head Release Is the Secret to Hitting Driver Farther

In This Video, You'll Learn:
• How to hit driver farther by learning the two-part release — toss and turn — that squares the face and delivers correct loft at impact
• Increase driver distance by eliminating the passive, hold-on swing pattern that robs you of club head speed and produces weak misses to the right
• Unlock how to release the golf club through a trail hand toss drill and lead arm rotation drill you can practice in minutes on the range
• Fix your golf swing with the same driver release cues Eric used with a real student to turn a weak right miss into a solid, center-fairway drive
• Apply two targeted golf drills — right hand only and left arm only — specifically designed to build driver release feel before you hit full shots
• Build the driver golf swing pattern seen in elite ball strikers: club head progressively releasing, passing the hands, and producing high, powerful drives
• Stop the weak right miss for good — the most common high handicap golfer driver problem — and start hitting it higher, farther, and straighter

Want to increase driver distance and finally fix that weak, short miss to the right? In this golf lesson, golf swing coach Eric Cogorno reveals the exact two-part release pattern — toss with the trail hand, turn with the lead arm — that the best drivers of the ball use to square the face and deliver power through impact. Most golf swing tips tell you to rotate your body harder. Eric shows you what your arms and hands actually need to do with the driver — and backs it up with golf swing analysis of real student results and PGA Tour player comparisons. Whether you're a high handicap golfer trying to keep it in play or an experienced player chasing more yards, this is the driver fix you've been looking for.

videos.title: Doriane Pin: F1 Academy Champion, Still Pushing | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Doriane Pin: F1 Academy Champion, Still Pushing | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast From the first time she sat in a kart, aged 9, Doriane Pin has wanted to race in Formula 1. F1 Academy champion, Mercedes Development Driver, poised to drive an F1 car for the first time - Doriane is getting closer and closer to that dream.

Doriane tells Tom Clarkson her racing story so far, from feeling like a 'superhero' in her kart, to seeking sponsors at the age of 11, taking on the Le Mans 24 hours, and being spotted by the Mercedes Junior Programme.

In F1 Academy, Doriane switched to racing open wheel cars on Grand Prix circuits, supported by Mercedes teammates Lewis Hamilton, George Russell and Kimi Antonelli. Susie Wolff's advice helped her score points in every race, and become champion at the end of her second season.

Now Doriane is Development Driver for Mercedes and is preparing for a first F1 test. Her dream remains the same: a seat on the Grand Prix grid.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

videos.title: PURE Golf Strikes Made Easy with This Basic Drill
videos.summary_source_text:

videos.title: METROPOLITAN DIVISION CHAMPIONS! Carolina Hurricanes Clinch 4th Overall Division Title in 6 Seasons
videos.summary_source_text:
METROPOLITAN DIVISION CHAMPIONS! Carolina Hurricanes Clinch 4th Overall Division Title in 6 Seasons The Carolina Hurricanes claim their fourth division title in the last six seasons after defeating the Boston Bruins 6-5 in overtime. What does it mean now with four games remaining? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' fourth division title in six seasons, their third Metropolitan Division title in that span. Plus, the Hurricanes' fourth 50-win season in the last five seasons. Also, we talk about the standout milestones on the night as well, from Staal to Blake to Bussi and more. Secondly, Zach reacts to what Jaccob Slavin said postgame after getting his first goal of the season, coming as the GWG in overtime. What does it mean for Slavin and the Hurricanes in their last home regular-season game of the year? Finally, Zach reacts to what Rod Brind'Amour said postgame. How did the coach feel as his team won another title under his tenure? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Avalanche Lock Up the #1 Spot in the West. How Serious Is the Kadri Injury?
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Lock Up the #1 Spot in the West. How Serious Is the Kadri Injury? The Colorado Avalanche lock up the top seed in the Western Conference, getting revenge on the St. Louis Blues and setting the stage for a playoff run with home-ice advantage. Can Nathan MacKinnon and Valeri Nichushkin power the Avs to even greater heights as the President’s Trophy comes into reach?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Colorado’s bounce-back win, highlighting Scott Wedgewood’s strong night in net, key adjustments after recent struggles, and the importance of defensive discipline. Discussion covers Valeri Nichushkin’s offensive spark, injury scares for Nazem Kadri and Wedgewood, and what the Avalanche must do to maintain momentum down the stretch. Get the latest insights on player returns, locker room mentality, and the pressing question—will the Avalanche’s resilience make them the hardest team to eliminate in the Stanley Cup Playoffs?

videos.title: Paul Maurice, Panthers Postgame: Florida Loses Late Lead, Kulikov in SO Loss to Montreal Canadiens
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice, Panthers Postgame: Florida Loses Late Lead, Kulikov in SO Loss to Montreal Canadiens Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media after his team lost 4-3 in a shootout to the host Montreal Canadiens on Tuesday, April 7, 2026. 

The Panthers were swept in their weekend Pittsburgh series by a total of 14-6 but had a lead here until Nick Suzuki scored with 20.1 seconds left. 

Florida also lost defenseman Dmitry Kulikov to a broken finger. 

The Panthers got goals from Carter Verhaeghe, Cole Reinhardt, and Eetu Luostarinen with Daniil Tarasov getting another start in net.

Florida was without Matthew Tkachuk after he returned to South Florida for the birth of his first child.

The Panthers continue their five-game road trip with Game 3 in Ottawa on Thursday. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.title: 3 Different Shots to Play From the Bunker #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
3 Different Shots to Play From the Bunker #golfswing #golftips Most golfers can get the ball out of the bunker — but not with the control they want.
This video shows you three bunker shot levels: get it out, get it controlled, and get it spinning.
It all comes down to your entry point — where the club first enters the sand.
Start experimenting with how close to the ball you strike the sand to control spin, rollout, and stopping power.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Most golfers can get the ball out of the bunker — but not with the control they want.

videos.title: A Simple Way to Break Sugar Cravings
videos.summary_source_text:
A Simple Way to Break Sugar Cravings Cravings can feel overwhelming, but they often start as simple thoughts. When those thoughts are observed instead of acted on, space is created to choose a different response. Over time, this shift in awareness makes it easier to step away from habits like sugar and constant snacking. Silence becomes a tool, helping separate the urge from the action and restoring control.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.


About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. Cravings can feel overwhelming, but they often start as simple thoughts. When those thoughts are observed instead of acted on, space is created to choose a different response. Over time, this shift in awareness makes it easier to step away from habits like sugar and constant snacking. Silence becomes a tool, helping separate the urge from the action and restoring control.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida.

videos.title: OpenAI Just Dropped The Real Plan After AGI Hits
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenAI Just Dropped The Real Plan After AGI Hits OpenAI just dropped a policy blueprint built around one huge idea: superintelligence could hit hard enough to force a whole new social contract. At the same time, OpenAI closed a massive funding round, pushed its AGI vision even harder, expanded its platform ambitions, bought TBPN, and got dragged into a lawsuit over ChatGPT allegedly acting like a lawyer. This story is about way more than one paper. It is about OpenAI trying to shape the rules, the infrastructure, the products, and the public narrative before AGI disruption fully hits.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

videos.title: Tommy Fleetwood joins + Masters predictions | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
Tommy Fleetwood joins + Masters predictions | The Drop The Drop is here to preview the 2026 Masters and we’ve got everything you need. Reigning FedExCup champion Tommy Fleetwood joins the show to talk about his past performances at The Masters and how he is aiming to shed the label “best player to not win a major.” From the FedExCup champion in 2025 to the current leader of the 2026 standings, Jacob Bridgeman stops by to talk about his season so far and how he is prepping for his Masters debut. And what’s a Masters week without predictions? We’ll go through all the talking points… long shots, best finishes by a first-timer, low round and of course, a declaration on who will be wearing a green jacket come Sunday evening.

videos.title: Goal Scoring Cheat Code
videos.summary_source_text:
Goal Scoring Cheat Code The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Golf Grip Fitting - Everything You Need To Know!
videos.summary_source_text:
Golf Grip Fitting - Everything You Need To Know! What really happened when I changed my grips?

Today’s video follows up on exact feedback to my Jumbo Max fitting.

I was fortunate to go through the process at The Trott Shop and talk to two of the best guys in the business when it comes to grip fittings. John Mazzanoble & Alex Trujillo.

BUT tendencies can’t be ignored and sometimes although we want to change it is diminishing to our game. As a golfer we have a certain perception of feel and comfort so when you move away from what you deem as “ right for you “ it can be quite the adjustment.

Jumbo Max is a journey, I think we can all learn from my fitting and I think the key takeaway is baby steps when it comes to making changes.

Remember the grip is the contact point with the club, be sure to take some time and get fit for this particular area. 

As always #comment with any questions and be sure to hit #subscibe for more equipment vids.

videos.title: I Wasted 6 Months Learning This…Here’s the 8-Minute Fix
videos.summary_source_text:
I Wasted 6 Months Learning This…Here’s the 8-Minute Fix I spent 6 months trying to improve my golf game, testing different swing thoughts, drills and fixes. While I did manage to drop 3 shots off my handicap, it took far longer than it should have.

In this video, I break down the exact thing that made the biggest difference. The best part is you can learn it in just 8 minutes.

This change did not just affect one part of my game. It improved my irons, driver, chipping and putting, and that is why it had such a big impact on my scores.

Whether you are struggling with consistency, slicing the ball or simply want to lower your scores faster, this is the shortcut I wish I had from day one.

This is not about overcomplicating your swing. It is about focusing on what actually moves the needle. If you apply this properly, you will start to see improvements in your ball striking, control and overall confidence on the course.

What you will learn

The key mistake that cost me months of progress
The simple fix that changed everything
How to apply it instantly to your own game
Why most golfers are practicing the wrong way

If you are serious about improving your golf game and breaking through scoring barriers like 100, 90 or 80, this is a must watch.

Book an online lesson with me - https://skillest.com/@AlexElliott

In this video, I reveal a simple setup tweak just 5 inches behind the ball that completely changed my driver. This one move helped me add distance, improve strike, and gain more consistency off the tee.

videos.title: Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Without Tkachuk in Montreal (For a Very Good Reason)
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Without Tkachuk in Montreal (For a Very Good Reason) Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media before his team plays the host Montreal Canadiens on Tuesday, April 7, 2026. 

The Panthers were swept in their weekend Pittsburgh series by a total of 14-6. 

With the loss Saturday, the two-time defending Stanley Cup champs were officially eliminated from the postseason. 

On Sunday, the Panthers got goals by Cole Schwindt and Carter Verhaeghe. 

Daniil Tarasov started the second game after playing the second half of Saturday’s game. He will play again tonight against the Canadiens.

Florida will be without Matthew Tkachuk after he returned to South Florida for the birth of his first child.

The Panthers continues their five-game road trip with the final three in Canada starting Tuesday in Montreal.

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.title: Mackie Samoskevich, Florida Panthers Morning Skate at Montreal Canadiens
videos.summary_source_text:
Mackie Samoskevich, Florida Panthers Morning Skate at Montreal Canadiens Florida Panthers forward Mackie Samoskevich meets the media before his team plays the host Montreal Canadiens on Tuesday, April 7, 2026. 

The Panthers were swept in their weekend Pittsburgh series by a total of 14-6. 

With the loss Saturday, the two-time defending Stanley Cup champs were officially eliminated from the postseason. 

On Sunday, the Panthers got goals by Cole Schwindt and Carter Verhaeghe. 

Daniil Tarasov started the second game after playing the second half of Saturday’s game. He will play again tonight against the Canadiens.

Florida will be without Matthew Tkachuk after he returned to South Florida for the birth of his first child.

The Panthers continues their five-game road trip with the final three in Canada starting Tuesday in Montreal.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

videos.title: Do ALL golfers need this 🤔
videos.summary_source_text:
Do ALL golfers need this 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

OpenAI officially acquired the media company TBPN, AKA the “ESPN of Tech Business.” 

For a company that said they weren’t doing “side quests” anymore, this is a wild pivot into podcasting, live-streaming and video news.

Is OpenAI trying to become a media powerhouse? And what implications while this have on TBPN editorially?

videos.title: How Far You SHOULD Hit Every Golf Club (Amateur vs Pro Data)
videos.summary_source_text:
How Far You SHOULD Hit Every Golf Club (Amateur vs Pro Data) How far you should hit every golf club is the #1 question golfers ask when trying to lower their handicap. In this video, I analyse millions of data points from Arccos Golf and PGA ShotLink to show you the massive distance gaps between amateurs and tour pros. 

You’ll learn why your 7-iron distance is lagging and why your wedge play is costing you shots due to poor launch angle and dynamic loft. Whether you are looking for driver distance tips or a golf club distance chart, this breakdown will help you understand the average golf club distances for your skill level and how to "deloft" the club like a pro for maximum "pop" off the face.

How Far Should You Hit Every Club by Index

0:00 The Truth About Your Distance Gaps
1:12 The 7-Iron Test: Amateurs vs. Pros
2:34 The Secret to Pro "Pop" (Dynamic Loft)
4:05 Drills to Deloft Your Irons
5:22 The Shocking Wedge Data (Why You Miss Greens)

videos.title: Rivals & Stars Of The F1 Season So Far | F1 Nation Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Rivals & Stars Of The F1 Season So Far | F1 Nation Podcast Tom Clarkson is joined by former F1 driver, Jolyon Palmer, and IndyCar race winner, James Hinchcliffe, to look back on what we’ve learned from the first three races of the season and what we can expect from Miami onwards.

The guys discuss the battle between George Russell and Kimi Antonelli at Mercedes, why Oscar Piastri and McLaren were better in Japan, and what they and Ferrari need to do to catch Mercedes.

Red Bull Racing find themselves in the midfield battle, so will they regret their decision to not switch full focus to 2026 when Laurent Mekies joined as Team Principal last season? Could Max Verstappen’s frustration benefit his teammate, Isack Hadjar? And with Haas and Alpine above Red Bull in the Constructors’ Standings, is it clear who the fourth fastest team on the grid is?

Plus, Hinch thinks Fernando Alonso is the most positive person at Aston Martin right now, Tom suggests a somewhat contentious reason why, and Jolyon isn’t having any of it!


For more F1® videos, visit: https://www.Formula1.com

videos.title: I'm Done Managing API Keys
videos.summary_source_text:
I'm Done Managing API Keys 🔥 The Zapier SDK Open Beta launches TODAY → https://mrc.fm/zapsdk

Every app I connect to my AI agents needs its own API key, its own OAuth flow, its own config. I've got 15 integrations duct taped together and it's getting ridiculous. So I tested the Zapier SDK. One login, 8,000 apps, full API access, auth completely handled. In this video I set it up live, pull my YouTube stats without touching Google Cloud, and build a multi model AI router from scratch that queries Claude, GPT and Gemini simultaneously, logs results to Google Sheets, and posts a synthesized answer to Slack. All through one SDK.

videos.summary_source_text:
Why I WON’T recommend these cars anymore... Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0704

Is this the ultimate electric SUV showdown? Mat’s back, and this time he’s brought the heavy hitters of the luxury EV world.

In this video, we’re pitting the established BMW iX against its newest, most formidable rivals. We have the boxy and brilliant Kia EV9, its sleek and sophisticated sibling, the Hyundai Ioniq 9, the ultra-minimalist Polestar 3, and the safety-focused Volvo EX90.

Which of these high-tech EVs offers the best range, the most luxury, and the best value for your money? Let’s find out!

The Contenders - Specs for the cars in this video:

- BMW iX: 109kWh battery, 403 miles range,  £75,405, 544hp (Dual Motor)

- Polestar 3: 107kWh battery, 438 miles range, £69,990, 300hp (Single Motor)

- Volvo EX90: 107kWh battery, 375 miles range, £73,160, 408hp (Dual Motor)

- Hyundai Ioniq 9: 106kWh battery, 372 miles range, £64,995, 427hp (Dual Motor)

- Kia EV9: 96kWh battery, 313 miles range, £66,035, 385hp (Dual Motor)

So what’s in this review?
- Design: From the bold BMW grille to the Ioniq’s "Aerosthetic" curves.
- Interior & Tech: Which cabin feels the most premium, and which infotainment system actually works?
- Practicality: We test the 7-seater capacity of the Kia, Hyundai, and Volvo versus the 5-seat luxury of the Polestar and BMW.
- Driving: Does a 2.5-tonne SUV have any right to be fast? (Spoiler: Yes).
- The Verdict: Which one should you buy, avoid, or lease?

So which EV SUV do you think will come out on top? Drop your guess in the comments, then join Mat for this group test!
