videos.title: The Ugly Truth About Avocados (You Won’t Like It)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Ugly Truth About Avocados (You Won’t Like It) Avocados are touted as a superfood, but are avocados a scam? Is avocado oil a healthy choice? Learn more about avocado nutritional deception and why you’ll need to do more than just read the labels on avocado oil.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr.Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4bOocPJ

0:00 Introduction: The avocado health fraud
0:37 Is avocado oil healthy? 
1:38 Fake avocado oil US
2:05 The avocado oil scam
3:13 Rancid avocado oil
3:47 Guacamole 
4:20 What is the best avocado oil? 
4:49 Which avocados are best?
5:22 Are avocados a scam?

DATA:
https://www.ucdavis.edu/food/news/study-finds-82-percent-avocado-oil-rancid-or-mixed-other-oils
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0956713520302449

Learn more about reading labels with this FREE resource: https://drbrg.co/3J951Wj 

Discover the real consequences of seed oils here: https://drbrg.co/4mc4jpU

Today, we’re going to investigate the truth about avocados, avocado oil, and your health. When avocados arrive at the grocery store, they’re often put into a gas chamber and artificially ripened with ethylene gas. The artificial ripening process leaves this superfood devoid of phytonutrients. 

One research study evaluated 22 different brands of avocado oil and discovered that many products were oxidized, which can cause inflammation. Surprisingly, many products were actually fake avocado oil, mainly composed of soy and canola oils.

Approximately 82% of avocado oil is not what it says it is! In the US, there are no official rules on avocado oil or a legally binding definition of the avocado oil extraction process. This has opened the door for corruption.

Some avocado oil products contain no avocado oil at all! The origins of your avocado oil can also be misleading. A product can be labeled “product of the US”, but grown and blended elsewhere, as long as the final product is bottled in the US. 

Avocado oil doesn’t always have an expiration or production date, making it difficult to determine how long it’s been sitting on the shelf.

Fast food guacamole does not contain much avocado. It’s often replaced with green peas, hydrogenated oils, and food starches. Cosmetics also claim to use avocado oil, yet soy, palm, and mineral oils are usually listed first on the ingredient list. 

If you want to buy avocado oil, look for the following:
•Dark, glass bottle 
•Expiration date 
•Avoid the cheapest brand
•Look for the harvest date
•Look for green-colored oil
 
When choosing avocados, look for Californian varieties, such as the Hass variety. Avoid the cheaper, shiny, bagged varieties. 

Avocados can be an incredibly healthy food if you choose the right ones. They contain healthy fats, minimal omega-6 fats, and are a rich source of potassium and magnesium.

Dr. Berg, age 60, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan, and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: Battling the B's! Carolina Hurricanes Face the Bruins in the Last Regular Season Home Game
videos.summary_source_text:
Battling the B's! Carolina Hurricanes Face the Bruins in the Last Regular Season Home Game The Carolina Hurricanes take on the Boston Bruins on Tuesday night for the last regular-season home game of 2025-26. While the season series is tied, who will win it in the rubber match? Who could be in the net for the Hurricanes? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing three storylines to watch for in the game against the Bruins on Tuesday night. Can the Hurricanes' penalty kill turn it around after going 0-for-2 on Sunday, and can the power play stay red hot? Will we see more milestones be reached against the Bruins, i.e., Seth Jarvis 34 goals on the season and Brandon Bussi getting win No. 30? Secondly, what could the goalie matchups look like for the Hurricanes and Bruins? Which makes the most sense with five games remaining before the playoffs? Finally, Zach concludes the show by picking his Canes to Click on Tuesday night and which players fans should keep an eye on. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

* Elämää Los Angelesissa – surffit, sää ja arki NHL-pelaajana 
* Ensimmäistä kertaa Kingsin peliin median edustajina 
* Suomalaispelaajien otteet: Armia & Samuel Helenius vs. Ottawa Senators 
* Pelin jälkeisessä hikihaastattelussa Samuel Helenius 

Lisäksi käydään fiilistelemässä Hollywoodin meininkiä Universal Studios-teemapuistossa Mukana myös: 
* Yleisökysymyksiä 
* Tarinoita pukukopista 
* Ja tietenkin: mitä Joel Armia toisi Porista? 

Tämä jakso on täynnä huumoria, NHL-kulissien taikaa ja suomalaista kiekko-osaamista maailman huipulla.

videos.title: Anthropic Just Killed My AI Agent Stack
videos.summary_source_text: Anthropic Just Killed My AI Agent Stack Last week I had unlimited Claude Opus 4.6 intelligence powering my entire AI agent stack… health coach, YouTube monitoring, social media, X accounts all through OpenClaw. Then Anthropic pulled OAuth support and it all came crashing down. I've been split-testing every frontier model (Gemini, Grok, GPT, open source, Chinese models) and NOTHING comes close to Claude Opus 4.6. So where do we go from here? videos.title: Avalanche Attempt to Lock Up the Top Spot in the West Pushed Back After Home Loss to Blues
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Attempt to Lock Up the Top Spot in the West Pushed Back After Home Loss to Blues Colorado Avalanche falter as the St. Louis Blues spoil their shot at locking up the top spot in the West. Can the Avs recapture their dominant home-ice mojo in time for a deep playoff run?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Colorado’s 3-2 loss, spotlighting the inconsistent defensive play, missed opportunities by Nathan MacKinnon and company, and how Mackenzie Blackwood’s presence shifts team dynamics. Key discussions include the Avalanche’s recent home struggles, St. Louis’ desperation mode with a wild card bid on the line, and critical moments like late odd-man rushes and penalty calls. The hosts also weigh in on Parker Kelly’s milestone, coaching decisions, and whether playoff intensity will turn things around for Jared Bednar’s squad.

Will Colorado regain its focus before the postseason, or are lingering issues cause for concern? Don’t miss this candid analysis of the Avalanche’s playoff prospects.

videos.title: Microsoft New AI Is 60X Faster Than Real Time (Beats Top Models)
videos.summary_source_text:
Microsoft New AI Is 60X Faster Than Real Time (Beats Top Models) Microsoft just launched MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1, and MAI-Image-2, though this story goes way beyond 3 new models. The bigger shift is that Microsoft is starting to look like a real AI model builder, not just OpenAI’s biggest partner. With faster performance, lower pricing, rollout across Copilot, Bing, PowerPoint, and Foundry, plus a clear push toward long-term AI self-sufficiency, this is one of the strongest signals yet that Microsoft wants full control of its AI future.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

🧠 What You’ll See
Microsoft MAI-Transcribe-1 Speech Model
SOURCE: https://microsoft.ai/news/state-of-the-art-speech-recognition-with-mai-transcribe-1/
Microsoft MAI-Voice-1 Text To Speech Model
SOURCE: https://ai.azure.com/catalog/models/MAI-Voice-1
Microsoft MAI-Image-2 Image Generation Model
SOURCE: https://microsoft.ai/news/today-were-announcing-3-new-world-class-mai-models-available-in-foundry/
Microsoft Pushes Beyond OpenAI With In House AI
SOURCE: https://www.businessinsider.com/microsoft-ai-models-azure-mai-transcribe-voice-image-foundry-openai-2026-4
Microsoft AI Strategy And Superintelligence Push
SOURCE: https://www.theverge.com/report/905791/mustafa-suleyman-microsoft-ai-transcription-model

🚨 Why It Matters
Microsoft is now attacking AI from every angle at once: cost, speed, enterprise scale, product integration, and long-term independence from OpenAI. The company is building its own models while still hosting competitors, which creates a powerful platform strategy, though it also highlights the broader industry tension around trust and reliability as AI moves deeper into real workflows.

videos.title: Claude's Source Code Got Leaked Across The Whole Internet
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude's Source Code Got Leaked Across The Whole Internet 🚨 Anthropic’s Claude source code just leaked across the internet, and it's revealing some major secrets about how the AI actually works.

videos.title: Claude Conway Explained: Anthropic’s 1M Token AI Agent Built for 24/7 Execution
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Conway Explained: Anthropic’s 1M Token AI Agent Built for 24/7 Execution Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
What if your AI didn’t wait for prompts… and just worked for you 24/7?claude conway, anthropic ai, claude 4.6, ai agents, autonomous ai, always on ai, ai automation, zapier alternative ai, ai workflows, ai agents explained, anthropic claude agent, cnw extensions, ai browser automation, ai coding agent, ai future 2026, gpt 4 vs claude, gemini vs claude, llama vs claude, ai business automation, ai tools 2026, agentic ai, ai productivity tools, bitbiased ai, ai news, ai breakdown
In this video, we break down Claude Conway — Anthropic’s leaked always-on AI agent platform that could completely replace tools like Zapier, Make, and n8n.

This isn’t just another chatbot. Conway runs in the background, watches triggers, executes tasks, browses the web, and even makes decisions — all without you prompting it.

We cover:

How Conway actually works (architecture + CNW extensions)
The model behind it (Claude 4.6, 1M token context)
Real-world use cases (coding, monitoring, automation)
Full comparison vs GPT-4, Gemini, and Llama
Pricing insights and enterprise implications
Whether this is hype… or the future of AI agents

By the end, you’ll know whether always-on AI agents are something you should start preparing for — or ignore for now.

videos.title: 5 Reasons Why the Studio Display XDR is BETTER than the Studio Display!
videos.summary_source_text:
5 Reasons Why the Studio Display XDR is BETTER than the Studio Display! Apple Studio Display XDR vs Studio Display — here are 5 reasons the XDR is worth the extra $1700.
2000 nits, 120Hz ProMotion, 2300 mini-LED dimming zones, Adobe RGB colour gamut, and the $400 tilt-and-height adjustable stand is actually included. It's also a far better value than the discontinued $5000 Pro Display XDR.

Both are 27-inch 5K with Center Stage and the same premium aluminium design — but the regular Studio Display feels outdated for $1600 in 2026.

videos.title: Debunking The Top Hand Misconception
videos.summary_source_text:
Debunking The Top Hand Misconception Stickhandling Like Patrick Kane | Train 2.0 Transformation Series - Week 1

Welcome to the first week of the Six-Week Stickhandling Transformation series with Coach Frank from Train 2.0. In this series, we’ll be breaking down the precise puck control mechanics used by NHLers like Patrick Kane, helping you improve your stickhandling to be smoother and more effortless than ever before.

In Week 1, we tackle a common misconception in stickhandling which is the traditional “V-grip” and introduce the NHL Pro Grip, which Patrick Kane uses to achieve elite puck control. By making a slight adjustment to your top hand’s grip, you’ll increase palm contact and overall control of the puck, opening up possibilities for advanced stickhandling, shooting, passing, and even skating.

Here’s what you’ll learn:
The difference between the V-grip and the NHL Pro Grip.
How Patrick Kane holds his stick and why it works.
Stationary stickhandling drills to get used to this new grip.
A 6-week plan to develop smooth, precise puck control.
Weekly Drill (Week 1):
Perform 100 stationary stickhandles with the NHL Pro Grip for 3 sets.
Create an obstacle course in your space and perform 100 reps for 3 sets.
Focus on the feel of the movement and how it changes your control.

videos.title: £38 to play links golf in ST ANDREWS and it’s a belter!
videos.summary_source_text:
£38 to play links golf in ST ANDREWS and it’s a belter! I have played a lot of golf courses in my time but this has to be the best value for money and I cannot believe it is in St Andrews, in fact it borders the Old Course. I paid just £38 to play The Eden on St Andrews Links and it was incredibly good golf course.

If you are planning a golf trip to Scotland or in fact St Andrews then this series is a must watch.

videos.title: 7 Exercises You MUST Pass (Or You’re Aging Too Fast)
videos.summary_source_text:
7 Exercises You MUST Pass (Or You’re Aging Too Fast) Everyone thinks they're fit until they actually have to prove it. In this video, I break down the ultimate fitness test using real fitness benchmarks and standards to show you exactly where your overall fitness stands. If you've ever wondered how to be fit, how to get fit, how strong you should be, or how to improve your fitness, this is where you find out.

FREE TOTAL BODY WORKOUT HERE - https://athleanx.com/tbfree
SUBSCRIBE TO THIS CHANNEL HERE - https://bit.ly/2b0coMW

These are not random exercises. Each test is designed to measure a critical component of overall fitness — including strength, stability, balance, mobility, and core strength. Together, they give you a complete picture of how fit you really are. And the good news? Every single one of these is trainable. That means every weakness you find here is fixable.

TEST 1: SINGLE LEG WALL SIT
The first test is the single leg wall sit — a measure of lower body strength, hip stability, and muscular endurance. The standard is 30 seconds per leg with your knee at 90 degrees and your back flat against the wall. If your hips shift, your knee caves, or you can't hold the full time, you have a stability deficit that directly impacts performance and injury risk. This is the same assessment used in sports physical therapy to evaluate ACL injury risk.

TEST 2: WALL SPLAT TEST
Next is the wall splat test — one of the most revealing mobility assessments you can perform. Stand with your toes close to the wall, arms overhead, and squat below parallel without losing position. To do this correctly, you need ankle mobility, hip mobility, thoracic extension, and overhead shoulder mobility — all working together. If your heels lift, your arms drop, or your lower back takes over, your mobility is directly limiting your strength and movement efficiency.

TEST 3: HAND RELEASE PUSH-UP
From there, we move into the hand release push-up — a true test of upper body strength, core stability, and muscular endurance. The standards are 40 reps for men in their 40s and 30 reps for women, with a gradual 5–10% decline per decade. If your hips sag, your range of motion shortens, or your tempo breaks down before you hit the mark, your strength and stability are not where they need to be.

TEST 4: DEAD ARM HANG
The dead arm hang is one of the best tests of grip strength, scapular stability, and total body control. The standard is 2 minutes for men in their 40s and 1 minute 15 seconds for women, with a one-second reduction per year after 40. Most people don't fail because their hands give out — they fail because their shoulders lose position and their core loses tension first. Grip strength is one of the most reliable predictors of long-term health outcomes, but this test shows far more than grip alone.

TEST 5: SIDE PLANK LEG LIFT
The side plank leg lift tests lateral core strength, hip abductor function, and the ability to resist movement under load. The standard is 30 seconds per side in perfect alignment — for all ages, men and women. If your hips drop, your torso rotates, or your top leg drifts forward to compensate, your lateral stability is breaking down. On this one, quality matters as much as time. Just making it 30 seconds does not mean you passed.

TEST 6: THE OLD MAN TEST
The old man test is one of the simplest yet most telling assessments in this entire lineup. Stand on one leg and put on your sock and shoe without letting your foot touch the ground — no wall, no grab, no reset. This tests single-leg balance, ankle stability, hip control, and proprioception. If you struggle here, it is not an age issue. It is a training issue.

TEST 7: PULL-UPS
The pull-up is the king of upper body pulling exercises and the ultimate test of strength relative to bodyweight. The standard is 15 clean, unbroken reps for men in their 40s and 7 for women — full extension at the bottom, chin clearly over the bar at the top, no kipping. If you cannot meet this standard, it exposes weaknesses in pulling strength, scapular control, grip endurance, and body composition all at once.

These benchmarks are not meant to discourage you. They are meant to direct you. Every test points to something specific — a weakness you can address, a limitation you can improve, a gap you can close. When you close those gaps, you don't just get better at the test. You move better, feel better, and live better.

If you are looking for a step-by-step workout program with a meal plan included, be sure to head over to athleanx.com and use the program selector to find the program that best matches your current training goal and ability levels.

For more videos on building and improving your fitness, make sure to subscribe to this channel here on YouTube and remember to turn on your notifications so you never miss a new video when it’s published. videos.title: Fix Your Impact With This iPhone Drill #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #golftips #ericcogorno
videos.summary_source_text:
Fix Your Impact With This iPhone Drill #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #golftips #ericcogorno #shorts 

In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno reveals a simple golf drill using an iPhone that teaches you proper wrist position through impact — fixing the flip that costs you distance and consistency.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn 

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created 
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1 

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com 

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com 

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• How to use wrist in the golf swing the right way — keeping the wrist ahead of the fingers through impact for solid, consistent contact 
• The iPhone phone golf drill that teaches you how to hinge wrist in golf and feel correct shaft lean without any special equipment 
• Why high handicap golfer misses almost always trace back to flipping — and the two-part fix (forward lean + forearm rotation) that stops it 
• How to use the Swing Coach app to measure your shaft lean in real time and get expert-level golf swing analysis on every rep 
• The trail hand and lead hand versions of this drill so you can train the feel that works best for your golf swing 
• What PGA Tour-level ball strikers like Adam Scott actually do through impact — and how to replicate it with a simple at-home golf drill 
• Why progressive club face rotation is non-negotiable for shaft lean — and how to dial in the right amount without overdoing it

Eric Cogorno breaks down one of the most misunderstood fundamentals in the game: how to properly use your wrists through impact to achieve real shaft lean. This golf lesson uses a dead-simple golf drill using your iPhone you can do anywhere — at home, at the range, or on the course — to train the wrist-forward, face-squaring motion that separates good ball strikers from inconsistent ones. Most high handicap golfer struggles at impact come down to the same root problem: the hands get behind the club head, the face flips open, and solid contact becomes nearly impossible to repeat. Understanding how to use wrist in the golf swing correctly — keeping the wrist ahead of the fingers while rotating the forearm to square the face — is what unlocks the shaft lean that tour-level ball strikers like Adam Scott produce on every swing. As a golf swing coach, Eric also demos the Swing Coach AI app live, showing how it tracks shaft lean and delivers instant audio feedback so you're never guessing whether your golf swing is improving or just grooving your flaws. These golf swing tips apply whether you're working on trail hand feel, lead hand feel, or both — making this one of the most versatile golf drills in Eric's coaching toolkit.

videos.title: The #1 Earliest Sign of Dementia
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Earliest Sign of Dementia Most people think dementia starts with memory loss… but that’s not true.

By the time you begin forgetting names, misplacing things, or feeling confused, the disease may have already been developing in your brain for 10 to 20 years.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4sek01U

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

That’s what makes early detection so important.

Researchers have found that dementia doesn’t begin in the memory centers of the brain: it starts elsewhere, affecting other functions long before memory decline appears.

Don’t wait until symptoms get worse; understand the early warning signs now.

videos.title: A Series of Carolina Hurricanes Milestones Over Easter Weekend
videos.summary_source_text:
A Series of Carolina Hurricanes Milestones Over Easter Weekend The Carolina Hurricanes split their Easter Weekend back-to-back against the New York Islanders and the Ottawa Senators. While they managed two out of four points, what stood out between the two games with the Hurricanes being close to winning a Metropolitan Division title? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts from the 4-3 win on Saturday against the Islanders. Seth Jarvis scored two goals to match his career high in goals. How huge was he in that win? Also, Jackson Blake continues his great sophomore season. Secondly, despite losing 6-3 to the Senators on Easter Sunday, what stood out in the game that saw Nikolaj Ehlers set a new career high in points? Why is it not that big of a deal that the Hurricanes did not clinch the division title over the weekend? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on the playoff picture after the weekend's games. Where do the Hurricanes stand, and who could they face in Round 1 of the Stanley Cup Playoffs? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Paul Maurice, Panthers Postgame: Florida Gets Swept in Pittsburgh by the Penguins
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice, Panthers Postgame: Florida Gets Swept in Pittsburgh by the Penguins Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media after his team lost 5-2 to the host Pittsburgh Penguins on Sunday, April 5, 2026. 

The Panthers were swept in their weekend Pittsburgh series by a total of 14-6. 

With the loss Saturday, the two-time defending Stanley Cup champs were officially eliminated from the postseason. 

On Sunday, the Panthers got goals by Cole Schwindt and Carter Verhaeghe. 

Daniil Tarasov started the second game after playing the second half of Saturday’s game. 

Florida continues its five-game road trip with the final three in Canada starting Tuesday in Montreal.

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

The Panthers Have Done It Again, Repeat as Cup Champs: https://floridahockeynow.com/florida-panthers-repeat-stanley-cup-champions-2025/

Panthers Get Their New Rings. Yeah, They Nice: https://floridahockeynow.com/stanley-cup-champion-florida-panthers-get-rings-yeah-they-nice/

videos.title: This New AI Might Be the Most Useful One Yet: CoWork
videos.summary_source_text:
This New AI Might Be the Most Useful One Yet: CoWork Abacus just released CoWork, and this might be one of the most useful AI desktop tools we’ve seen in a while. Instead of acting like another chatbot, CoWork is built to take messy folders full of receipts, PDFs, spreadsheets, logs, transcripts, Jira tickets, and compliance docs, then turn all of that into finished work people can actually use. In the demos, it audits expenses, rebuilds incident timelines, answers giant compliance forms with citations, analyzes supplier and pricing risk, repurposes podcast transcripts into content packages, and turns product research into PRD-ready output. 

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

🧠 What You’ll See
Source: Abacus CoWork - https://desktop.abacus.ai/
0:00 Intro
0:21 What is CoWork
0:51 The Real Pain Point
1:22 Abacus AI Desktop Ecosystem
2:18 Expense Audit Demo
3:29 Incident Post-Mortem Demo
4:27 RFP Compliance Workflow
4:52 Procurement & Margin Analysis
5:48 Podcast-to-Content Pipeline
6:54 Product Research to PRD
7:44 Live-to-do plan
8:09 Security side
8:31 Conclusion

🚨 Why It Matters
CoWork shows where AI tools are heading next. This is less about chatting and more about actually working through messy real-world inputs across multiple file types, then delivering reports, plans, answers, spreadsheets, and content packages with structure and reasoning. If this category keeps improving, AI tools start looking much more like real digital workers.

These golf clubs have to go! Your Top 3 Tips As To When You Should Get New Wedges - and this might not be what you expected.

In today’s upload I give you 3 telling signs that will reveal that you should consider new wedges.

Your short game can save you multiple shots and is often the easiest place to improve BUT your wedges could be hindering the ceiling available to you as a golfer.

Follow my guide to establish if you should treat yourself to new short game tools. Everything from loft, bounce and practice wedges are all discussed in an attempt to get you on the right path.
